title: Uniform-in-time Gaussian fluctuations for multiscale nonlinear stochastic systems via Malliavin Calculus
comment: 41 Pages. Any feedback or comments would be greatly appreciated
summary: We establish a uniform-in-time quantitative central limit theorem (QCLT) for a nonlinear slow-fast stochastic system. We identify significant weaker sufficient conditions that enable us to obtain time-independent bounds for the Wasserstein distance between the fluctuation process and a centered Gaussian random variable. To prove our main result, we utilize tools from Malliavin calculus, specifically the second-order Poincaré inequality. In this context, applying the Poincaré inequality requires demonstrating uniform bounds over time for both the first- and second-order Malliavin derivatives.

AI.tldr: 利用Malliavin微积分为非线性慢-快随机系统建立了一致时间定量中心极限定理。
AI.translated_summary: 我们建立了一个非线性慢-快随机系统的一致时间定量中心极限定理（QCLT）。我们识别了显著更弱的充分条件，使我们能够获得波动过程与中心化高斯随机变量之间Wasserstein距离的时间无关界。为了证明我们的主要结果，我们利用了Malliavin微积分中的工具，特别是二阶Poincaré不等式。在此背景下，应用Poincaré不等式需要证明一阶和二阶Malliavin导数在时间上的一致界。
AI.research_problem: 非线性慢-快随机系统的波动过程在长时间行为下缺乏时间一致的定量中心极限定理，已有结果的充分条件过强。
AI.key_innovation: 提出了显著更弱的充分条件，通过Malliavin微积分中的二阶Poincaré不等式获得Wasserstein距离的时间无关界。
AI.motivation: 研究非线性慢-快随机系统中波动过程的长时间渐近行为，需要时间一致的定量估计，而已有方法的条件限制较强。
AI.method: 利用Malliavin微积分工具，特别是二阶Poincaré不等式，并证明一阶和二阶Malliavin导数在时间上的一致界。
AI.experiments: 本文为理论研究，无数值实验。
AI.result: 在更弱的充分条件下，成功获得了波动过程与中心化高斯随机变量之间Wasserstein距离的时间无关界。
AI.conclusion: 在更弱的条件下建立了一致时间定量中心极限定理，为非线性慢-快随机系统的长时间波动行为提供了严格的定量刻画。

title: The one-point Schreier Poisson boundary of Thompson's group $F$
summary:
We identify the Poisson boundary of the one-point Schreier-chain random walk obtained by projecting the simple symmetric random walk on Thompson's group $F$ to the dyadic orbit point $1/2$. For the associated simple labelled-generator walk on the dyadic Schreier graph, the full Poisson boundary is the skeleton end boundary. The proof combines the known description of this Schreier graph as a binary-tree skeleton with recurrent one-dimensional ray attachments with an explicit trace computation. After tracing to the grey skeleton and deleting holding probabilities, the walk becomes a reversible nearest-neighbor walk on the rooted binary tree with two unequal classes of edge conductance. This reduces the boundary identification to standard Poisson--Martin theory for transient walks on trees and leaves a finite electrical-network calculation for the harmonic measure.
  Following Kaimanovich's coding of skeleton ends by odd 2-adic integers [{\emph{Groups, Graphs and Random Walks}}, London Math. Soc. Lecture Note Ser.~436, pp.~300--342, 2017], the hitting measure is a biased Bernoulli product measure with explicitly computed bias. It is singular with respect to Haar measure, has full topological support, and is exact-dimensional; these properties and the exact constants are proved here.

AI.tldr: 确定Thompson群F相关随机游走的Poisson边界为骨架端边界，并显式计算命中测度。
AI.translated_summary: 我们识别了通过将Thompson群F上的简单对称随机游走投影到二进轨道点1/2所得到的一点Schreier链随机游走的Poisson边界。对于二进Schreier图上相关的简单标记生成元游走，完整的Poisson边界是骨架端边界。证明将此Schreier图作为带有递归一维射线附着的二叉树骨架的已知描述与显式迹计算相结合。在追踪到灰色骨架并删除保持概率后，该游走变为根二叉树上具有两类不等边电导的可逆最近邻游走。这将边界识别归结为树上瞬态游走的标准Poisson-Martin理论，并为调和测度留下了一个有限的电网络计算。遵循Kaimanovich用奇2-adic整数对骨架端的编码[Groups, Graphs and Random Walks, London Math. Soc. Lecture Note Ser. 436, pp. 300-342, 2017]，命中测度是具有显式计算偏置的偏置Bernoulli乘积测度。它关于Haar测度是奇异的，具有满拓扑支撑，且是精确维的；这些性质和精确常数在此得到证明。
AI.research_problem: 识别Thompson群F上的简单对称随机游走投影到二进轨道点1/2后所得Schreier链随机游走的Poisson边界，并刻画相关命中测度的性质。
AI.key_innovation: 将Schreier图的二叉树骨架结构与显式迹计算结合，把问题归结为树上瞬态游走的标准Poisson-Martin理论，从而完成边界识别与调和测度的有限电网络计算。
AI.motivation: 理解Thompson群F上随机游走的Poisson边界是研究该群随机性质的核心问题，通过Schreier图的投影分析可为群本身的边界结构提供重要线索。
AI.method: 利用Schreier图作为二叉树骨架加递归一维射线附着的已知描述，进行显式迹计算；追踪到灰色骨架并删除保持概率后，将游走转化为根二叉树上具有两类不等边电导的可逆最近邻游走；应用Poisson-Martin理论和有限电网络计算；遵循Kaimanovich的骨架端编码方法分析命中测度。
AI.experiments: 本文为理论数学论文，无传统实验。主要计算包括显式迹计算、有限电网络计算以及命中测度偏置常数的显式推导。
AI.result: 完整Poisson边界被确定为骨架端边界；命中测度为具有显式偏置的偏置Bernoulli乘积测度，关于Haar测度奇异，具有满拓扑支撑，且为精确维的；所有关键性质和精确常数均得到证明。
AI.conclusion: Thompson群F投影到二进轨道点1/2的随机游走的Poisson边界已完全识别为骨架端边界，命中测度的性质和精确常数均已严格确立。
AI.limitations: 摘要中未明确提及局限性。该结果针对特定投影和Schreier图，是否可推广至Thompson群F本身或其他投影仍为开放问题。

title: Decorated stable $p$-adic self-similar processes with stationary increments
summary: We construct new classes of examples of self-similar processes with stationary increments indexed by $\mathbb Q_p$ via stable integrals. Classical constructions arise from the real counterpart and from discounted branching random walks. We discuss a new decoration technique that significantly enlarges these classes. The decoration technique makes use of the special symmetry of $\mathbb{Q}_p$ to obtain self-similarity and stationarity of increments, and it does not have an analogue on the real line. We also show that these enlarged classes of decorated processes are pairwise incomparable under inclusion.

AI.tldr: 利用p进数对称性提出装饰技术，构造新的自相似平稳增量过程类。
AI.translated_summary: 我们通过稳定积分构造了以$\mathbb{Q}_p$为指标集的、具有平稳增量的自相似过程的新例子类。经典构造源自实数情形的对应物以及带折扣的分支随机游走。我们讨论了一种新的装饰技术，该技术显著扩大了这些过程类。该装饰技术利用$\mathbb{Q}_p$的特殊对称性来获得自相似性和增量平稳性，且在实数轴上没有对应物。我们还证明了这些经装饰的扩大的过程类在包含关系下是两两不可比的。
AI.research_problem: 如何突破经典构造方法的局限，获得更多以$\mathbb{Q}_p$为指标集的具有平稳增量的自相似过程例子。
AI.key_innovation: 提出了一种新的装饰技术（decoration technique），利用$\mathbb{Q}_p$特有的对称性实现自相似性与增量平稳性，该技术在实数轴上无对应物。
AI.motivation: 经典构造（源自实数情形和带折扣的分支随机游走）所能产生的过程类有限，需要新方法来扩大这些类的范围。
AI.method: 通过稳定积分构造以$\mathbb{Q}_p$为指标集的自相似过程，并引入装饰技术利用p进数的特殊对称性扩展过程类。
AI.experiments: 本文为理论数学研究，不涉及数值实验。
AI.result: 装饰技术显著扩大了自相似过程的例子类，且这些扩大的装饰过程类在包含关系下两两不可比。
AI.conclusion: 借助$\mathbb{Q}_p$的独特对称性，装饰技术能够构造出实数轴上无法实现的自相似平稳增量过程新类，且这些类在包含关系下互不可比。

title: Sparsity-adaptive concentration inequalities for random polynomials
summary:
We prove concentration inequalities for polynomials of independent, sparse $α$-sub-exponential random variables. Specifically, we consider $X_i=δ_iξ_i$, where the Bernoulli selectors $δ_i$ are independent with parameters $p_i$, and the variables $ξ_i$ are independent \(α\)-sub-exponential random variables (not necessarily centered). For any polynomial $f:\mathbb R^n\to\mathbb R $ of degree at most $D$ and any $0<α\le 1 $, we establish an $L_r$-moment bound for \(f(X)-\mathbb E f(X)\) in terms of partition norms of sparsity-weighted expected derivative tensors. The weights count distinct coordinates rather than multiplicities and therefore distinguish diagonal, partially diagonal, and off-diagonal contributions. This captures the sparse scaling in both collective fluctuation regimes and extreme-coordinate regimes.
  When all sparsity parameters are equal to one, our result recovers the polynomial concentration inequality of Götze, Sambale, and Sinulis. In degree two, it recovers sparse Hanson-Wright bounds. As applications, we derive deviation inequalities for the distance between a sparse simple random tensor and a fixed subspace, and obtain lower bounds for the smallest singular value of matrices whose columns are independent sparse simple random tensors.

AI.tldr: 证明了稀疏α-次指数随机变量多项式的集中不等式，并应用于随机张量距离与最小奇异值下界。
AI.translated_summary: 我们证明了独立稀疏α-次指数随机变量的多项式的集中不等式。具体地，我们考虑$X_i=δ_iξ_i$，其中伯努利选择变量$δ_i$是独立的，参数为$p_i$，变量$ξ_i$是独立的α-次指数随机变量（不一定中心化）。对于任意次数不超过$D$的多项式$f:\mathbb R^n\to\mathbb R$和任意$0<α\le 1$，我们建立了$f(X)-\mathbb E f(X)$的$L_r$-矩界，该界以稀疏加权的期望导数张量的分割范数表示。权重计算不同的坐标而非重数，因此区分了对角、部分对角和非对角的贡献。这捕捉了集体波动机制和极端坐标机制中的稀疏缩放。当所有稀疏参数都等于1时，我们的结果恢复了Götze、Sambale和Sinulis的多项式集中不等式。在二次情况下，它恢复了稀疏Hanson-Wright界。作为应用，我们推导了稀疏简单随机张量与固定子空间之间距离的偏差不等式，并获得了列由独立稀疏简单随机张量组成的矩阵的最小奇异值的下界。
AI.research_problem: 稀疏随机变量多项式的集中不等式缺乏一般性理论框架，现有结果（如Götze-Sambale-Sinulis的多项式集中不等式和Hanson-Wright界）未考虑稀疏性，无法刻画稀疏缩放在不同波动机制中的影响。
AI.key_innovation: 引入稀疏加权的期望导数张量分割范数，权重按不同坐标计数而非重数，从而区分对角、部分对角和非对角贡献，统一捕捉集体波动与极端坐标两种机制下的稀疏缩放行为。
AI.motivation: 稀疏随机变量在随机矩阵和张量理论中广泛出现，但已有集中不等式未考虑稀疏性，需要将理论推广至稀疏α-次指数随机变量的多项式情形。
AI.method: 考虑乘积模型$X_i=δ_iξ_i$，其中$δ_i$为独立伯努利选择变量、$ξ_i$为独立α-次指数随机变量；利用稀疏加权的期望导数张量分割范数建立多项式的$L_r$-矩界。
AI.experiments: 本文为理论工作，无数值实验。应用验证包括：推导稀疏简单随机张量与固定子空间距离的偏差不等式，以及列由独立稀疏简单随机张量组成的矩阵最小奇异值下界。
AI.result: 建立了稀疏α-次指数随机变量多项式的一般$L_r$-矩集中不等式；稀疏参数全为1时恢复Götze-Sambale-Sinulis结果；二次情形恢复稀疏Hanson-Wright界；并给出随机张量距离偏差不等式与矩阵最小奇异值下界。
AI.conclusion: 所提集中不等式统一并推广了已有结果，为稀疏随机张量和矩阵的偏差分析与奇异值估计提供了通用理论工具。

title: On the geometry of unbounded wandering domains
summary: We study the geometry of unbounded wandering domains of entire functions using Arakelian approximation. First, we show that, given a uniformly accessible closed set contained in a strip, the connected components of its interior can be realized as escaping or oscillating wandering domains of some entire function. The iterates of the function are univalent on these wandering domains, and any unbounded wandering domain remains unbounded under iteration. Second, we show that, in some precise sense, any simply connected open set can be approximated by escaping or oscillating wandering domains. As a direct consequence, we obtain wandering domains whose complements have arbitrarily small areas.

AI.tldr: 利用Arakelian逼近构造整函数的无界游荡域，实现任意单连通开集的逼近。
AI.translated_summary: 我们利用Arakelian逼近研究整函数的无界游荡域的几何性质。首先，我们证明，给定包含在带状区域内的一个一致可达闭集，其内部的连通分量可以实现为某个整函数的逃逸或振荡游荡域。该函数的迭代在这些游荡域上是单叶的，并且任何无界游荡域在迭代下保持无界。其次，我们证明，在某种精确意义下，任何单连通开集都可以被逃逸或振荡游荡域逼近。作为一个直接推论，我们得到了补集面积可以任意小的游荡域。
AI.research_problem: 如何利用几何构造实现整函数的无界游荡域，以及这些游荡域能否逼近任意给定的单连通开集。
AI.key_innovation: 将Arakelian逼近应用于整函数无界游荡域的几何构造，证明带状区域内一致可达闭集的内部连通分量可实现为逃逸或振荡游荡域，且函数迭代在其上单叶。
AI.motivation: 理解整函数无界游荡域的几何结构及其在迭代动力学下的行为，探索游荡域对任意开集的逼近能力。
AI.method: 使用Arakelian逼近技术，结合复动力学中整函数迭代理论，构造满足特定几何与动力学性质的整函数。
AI.experiments: 无（纯理论证明）
AI.result: 证明了带状区域内一致可达闭集的内部连通分量可实现为逃逸或振荡游荡域，迭代单叶且无界性保持；任意单连通开集可被此类游荡域逼近，推论得到补集面积任意小的游荡域。
AI.conclusion: Arakelian逼近为整函数无界游荡域的几何构造提供了强大工具，能够实现广泛的逼近性质和特定的动力学行为。

title: Distributionally Robust Joint Information and Mechanism Design for Multi-Area Power System Coordination
summary: We study a continuous-time stochastic Stackelberg control problem in which a leader steers a system of strategic followers through two non-standard channels - the information structure and a transfer mechanism - rather than through the dynamics directly. The latent environment is a jump-diffusion; the leader commits to a Gaussian public-signaling channel whose belief consequences are tracked by a finite-dimensional projection filter (the exact filter being infinite-dimensional), together with a Groves transfer that aligns the followers' incentives. Under truthful disclosure, efficient behavior is a dominant-strategy best response, and the induced differential game admits saturated and bang-bang Nash feedback. We cast the leader's distributionally robust problem, over a relative-entropy ambiguity neighborhood, as a two-controller Isaacs equation; prove that incentive alignment collapses the bilevel Stackelberg problem to a single robust control problem with an exact first-order condition; and characterize the value function as the unique viscosity solution, with a verification theorem valid for the non-smooth bang-bang feedback and a semiconcavity result that renders the switching set Lebesgue-null. We instantiate the framework on resilient multi-area power-system coordination under extreme weather. Calibrated to the 2021 Winter Storm Uri, an Isaacs solve over ERCOT's near-islanded interconnection (a 0.82 GW tie, under 2% of peak) shows mutual aid removes about 8% of social cost, rising to roughly 30% under the FERC/DOE-recommended interregional transfer capability; a reserve-scheduling experiment shows that public disclosure lowers welfare cost by 37% under autarky and 48% under market coupling, and that information design and market coupling are complements under common (systemic) risk.

AI.tldr: 激励对齐将双层Stackelberg问题降为单层鲁棒控制，并应用于极端天气下电力系统协调。
AI.translated_summary: 我们研究了一个连续时间随机Stackelberg控制问题，其中领导者通过两个非标准渠道——信息结构和转移机制——而非直接通过动力学来引导由策略型跟随者组成的系统。潜在环境为跳扩散过程；领导者承诺采用一个高斯公共信号信道，其信念后果由有限维投影滤波器（精确滤波器为无限维）跟踪，同时配合Groves转移机制以对齐跟随者的激励。在真实披露下，有效行为是占优策略最优响应，所导出的微分博弈存在饱和与bang-bang Nash反馈。我们将领导者在相对熵模糊邻域上的分布鲁棒问题转化为双控制器Isaacs方程；证明激励对齐将双层Stackelberg问题坍缩为单一鲁棒控制问题，并具有精确的一阶条件；将值函数表征为唯一的粘性解，其验证定理对非光滑bang-bang反馈有效，且半凹性结果使得切换集为Lebesgue零测集。我们在极端天气下的弹性多区域电力系统协调中实例化该框架。以2021年冬季风暴Uri为校准，对ERCOT近乎孤岛化的互联系统（0.82 GW联络线，低于峰值的2%）进行Isaacs求解，结果表明互济可消除约8%的社会成本，在FERC/DOE推荐的区域间传输能力下可提升至约30%；一项备用调度实验表明，公开披露在自给自足模式下将福利成本降低37%，在市场耦合模式下降低48%，且信息设计与市场耦合在共同（系统性）风险下互为互补。
AI.research_problem: 在连续时间随机Stackelberg博弈中，领导者如何通过信息结构和转移机制（而非直接修改动力学）来引导策略型跟随者，并在分布模糊性下实现鲁棒决策，同时处理无限维滤波与双层优化的计算与理论困难。
AI.key_innovation: 证明激励对齐（Groves转移）将双层Stackelberg问题精确坍缩为单一鲁棒控制问题，并给出非光滑bang-bang反馈下的验证定理及值函数半凹性，使切换集为Lebesgue零测集。
AI.motivation: 极端天气事件（如2021年冬季风暴Uri）暴露了多区域电力系统协调的脆弱性，需要同时考虑信息设计、激励机制与跨区域互济的联合优化框架。
AI.method: 采用高斯公共信号信道与有限维投影滤波器跟踪信念，结合Groves转移机制实现激励对齐；将分布鲁棒问题表述为相对熵模糊邻域上的双控制器Isaacs方程，通过粘性解理论进行刻画。
AI.experiments: 以2021年冬季风暴Uri为校准场景，在ERCOT近乎孤岛化的互联系统上进行Isaacs方程求解；设计备用调度实验，比较自给自足与市场耦合模式下信息公开与否的福利影响。
AI.result: 互济消除约8%社会成本，在FERC/DOE推荐传输能力下提升至约30%；公开披露在自给自足模式下降低福利成本37%，市场耦合模式下降低48%；信息设计与市场耦合在系统性风险下互为互补。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架将复杂的双层Stackelberg问题简化为可求解的单一鲁棒控制问题，信息设计与市场耦合在系统性风险下具有互补性，区域间传输能力提升显著降低社会成本。
AI.limitations: 采用有限维投影滤波器近似无限维精确滤波器，存在近似误差；框架的验证依赖于真实披露假设与特定的高斯信号结构。

title: Delay-Penalty Comparison for Sequential Testing and Quickest Detection in State-Dependent Diffusion Models
summary: We study sequential testing and Bayesian quickest detection for diffusion observations whose drift changes between two alternatives while the signal-to-noise ratio may depend on the current observation. In this setting the posterior probability is generally not a closed one-dimensional Markov statistic: the natural sufficient state is the augmented process consisting of the posterior (or likelihood ratio) and the observed diffusion. We formulate both testing and quickest detection within this common filtering framework and identify the corresponding degenerate free-boundary problems. The main contribution is a delay-penalty comparison principle. For a common terminal false-alarm or terminal decision cost, a pointwise larger running delay penalty increases the value of continuation, shrinks the continuation region, and yields earlier stopping. When the stopping set has a one-sided posterior representation, this gives an order relation for the optimal alarm boundaries. The result applies to linear delay costs and to nonlinear marginal delay penalties after the appropriate Markovian augmentation, and is illustrated by a constant signal-to-noise Shiryaev example in which the alarm threshold is computed numerically and shown to be monotone in the delay cost. The framework clarifies how state-dependent information and nonlinear delay costs jointly affect the geometry of sequential testing and quickest-detection rules.

AI.tldr: 提出延迟惩罚比较原理，揭示状态依赖信息与非线性延迟成本对序贯检验与最快检测规则几何的影响。
AI.translated_summary: 我们研究扩散观测的序贯检验和贝叶斯最快检测问题，其中漂移在两种备选假设之间发生变化，而信噪比可能依赖于当前观测值。在此设定下，后验概率通常不是一个封闭的一维马尔可夫统计量：自然的充分状态是由后验（或似然比）和观测扩散过程组成的增广过程。我们在这一共同的滤波框架下同时表述检验和最快检测问题，并识别出相应的退化自由边界问题。主要贡献是一个延迟惩罚比较原理：对于共同的终端虚警或终端决策成本，逐点更大的运行延迟惩罚会增加继续的价值，缩小继续区域，并导致更早停止。当停止集具有单侧后验表示时，这给出了最优报警边界的序关系。该结果适用于线性延迟成本以及经过适当马尔可夫增广后的非线性边际延迟惩罚，并通过一个恒定信噪比的Shiryaev例子进行说明，其中报警阈值通过数值计算得到，并证明其关于延迟成本具有单调性。该框架阐明了状态依赖信息和非线性延迟成本如何共同影响序贯检验和最快检测规则的几何结构。
AI.research_problem: 在信噪比依赖于当前观测值的扩散过程设定下，后验概率不再是封闭的一维马尔可夫统计量，传统的序贯检验和贝叶斯最快检测方法无法直接适用，需要新的理论框架来处理此类状态依赖信息和非线性延迟成本问题。
AI.key_innovation: 提出了延迟惩罚比较原理，证明了在相同终端成本下，逐点更大的运行延迟惩罚会增加继续价值、缩小继续区域并导致更早停止，从而为最优报警边界建立了序关系。
AI.motivation: 扩散观测中信噪比可能依赖于当前观测值，导致后验概率不再是封闭的一维马尔可夫统计量，需要理解状态依赖信息和非线性延迟成本如何共同影响序贯检验和最快检测规则的几何结构。
AI.method: 将序贯检验和最快检测统一纳入共同的滤波框架，以后验（或似然比）与观测扩散过程的增广过程作为充分状态，识别相应的退化自由边界问题，并建立延迟惩罚比较原理。
AI.experiments: 通过一个恒定信噪比的Shiryaev例子进行数值验证，计算了报警阈值并验证其关于延迟成本的单调性。
AI.result: 证明了更大的运行延迟惩罚会增加继续价值、缩小继续区域、导致更早停止；当停止集具有单侧后验表示时，得到了最优报警边界的序关系；数值例子验证了报警阈值关于延迟成本的单调性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架阐明了状态依赖信息和非线性延迟成本如何共同影响序贯检验和最快检测规则的几何结构，延迟惩罚比较原理为最优停止边界提供了明确的比较关系。

title: Exact vs approximate second-order derivatives in vertically-integrated ice sheet models
summary: Second order derivatives of model outputs with respect to input parameters are key to several applications in ice sheet modelling. For example, the ability to compute Hessian-vector products broadens the list of available optimisation methods, and facilitates certain kinds of parametric uncertainty quantification. Some modern ice sheet models are built on frameworks supporting algorithmic differentiation (AD), allowing for the computation of higher order derivatives with relative ease. However, many of our most widely-used models are not. A natural alternative might be to follow common practise in first order gradient computation and construct an approximate second-order adjoint model at the PDE level, which neglects the nonlinear dependence of ice viscosity on velocity. Here, we present such a model for the shallow-stream approximation allowing one to compute approximate second-order derivatives, and compare with full second-order derivates found using AD. We find that this produces Hessian-vector products that are superficially similar to those computed via AD. However, an analysis of the spectral decomposition of the Hessians calculated in each way reveals that the subspaces spanned by their eigenvectors diverge after the leading 4 modes, though divergence does not accelerate after this. We conclude that the utility of the approximate Hessian is case-dependent, and a full Hessian, likely computed using AD, should be used where high fidelity is required above very low rank.

AI.tldr: 提出近似二阶伴随模型计算冰盖Hessian，发现其与前4阶特征模态后偏离AD结果。
AI.translated_summary: 模型输出关于输入参数的二阶导数在冰盖建模的若干应用中至关重要。例如，计算Hessian-向量乘积的能力扩展了可用的优化方法列表，并有助于某些类型的参数不确定性量化。一些现代冰盖模型建立在支持算法微分（AD）的框架之上，能够相对容易地计算高阶导数。然而，我们许多最广泛使用的模型并非如此。一种自然的替代方案可能是遵循一阶梯度计算中的常见做法，在偏微分方程（PDE）层面构建一个近似的二阶伴随模型，该模型忽略冰黏度对速度的非线性依赖。在此，我们提出了一个适用于浅流近似的此类模型，使其能够计算近似二阶导数，并与使用AD得到的完整二阶导数进行比较。我们发现，这产生的Hessian-向量乘积在表面上与通过AD计算的相似。然而，对以两种方式计算的Hessian的谱分解分析表明，其特征向量所张成的子空间在前4个主模态之后出现偏离，尽管此后偏离不再加速。我们得出结论，近似Hessian的实用性取决于具体情况，在需要在极低秩以上保持高保真度的场合，应使用完整的Hessian，这可能需要通过AD来计算。
AI.research_problem: 许多广泛使用的冰盖模型不支持算法微分（AD），无法便捷计算二阶导数（Hessian），而Hessian对优化和不确定性量化至关重要。
AI.key_innovation: 在PDE层面构建适用于浅流近似的近似二阶伴随模型，通过忽略冰黏度对速度的非线性依赖来近似计算二阶导数。
AI.motivation: 二阶导数（Hessian-向量乘积）可扩展优化方法并支持参数不确定性量化，但多数主流冰盖模型缺乏AD支持，需要替代方案。
AI.method: 在浅流近似下构建忽略冰黏度非线性依赖的近似二阶伴随模型，计算近似Hessian-向量乘积，并与AD计算的完整二阶导数进行对比和谱分解分析。
AI.experiments: 将近似Hessian与AD计算的完整Hessian进行比较，重点分析两者Hessian-向量乘积的表面相似性及谱分解中特征向量子空间的差异。
AI.result: 近似Hessian-向量乘积在表面上与AD结果相似，但谱分解显示特征向量子空间在前4个主模态后发生偏离，此后偏离不再加速。
AI.conclusion: 近似Hessian的实用性取决于具体应用场景；在需要极低秩以上高保真度的场合，应使用通过AD计算的完整Hessian。
AI.limitations: 近似方法忽略了冰黏度对速度的非线性依赖，且特征向量子空间在前4阶模态后与完整Hessian偏离，高保真度需求下不适用。

title: Hessian-augmented Supervised Learning for Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman PDEs
summary: A data-driven method is developed for approximating value functions in deterministic optimal control problems with nonlinear control-affine dynamics. The Pontryagin Maximum Principle optimality system is solved from multiple initial conditions to generate training data consisting of values, gradients, and Hessians of the value function, where Hessian information is obtained from a matrix Riccati equation along optimal trajectories. These quantities augment a weighted least-squares regression over sparse polynomial bases on hyperbolic cross index sets, with gradients and Hessians contributing additional linear equations per sample and substantially reducing sample complexity compared to value-only regression. Feedback laws are recovered analytically from the learned value function. In high dimensions, a partial Hessian strategy controls the cost of data generation. The approach is validated on problems of increasing state dimension, where second-order data augmentation is shown to improve approximation accuracy and closed-loop performance, with up to an order-of-magnitude reduction in the number of training samples required relative to lower-order methods.

AI.tldr: 利用值函数的梯度和海森矩阵增强稀疏多项式回归，显著降低最优控制值函数近似的样本复杂度。
AI.translated_summary: 本文开发了一种数据驱动方法，用于近似求解具有非线性控制仿射动力学的确定性最优控制问题中的值函数。该方法通过从多个初始条件求解庞特里亚金最大值原理最优性系统，生成包含值函数的值、梯度和海森矩阵的训练数据，其中海森矩阵信息通过沿最优轨迹的矩阵黎卡提方程获得。这些量增强了基于双曲交叉指标集上稀疏多项式基的加权最小二乘回归，梯度和海森矩阵为每个样本贡献额外的线性方程，与仅使用值的回归相比大幅降低了样本复杂度。反馈控制律从学习到的值函数中解析恢复。在高维情况下，采用部分海森矩阵策略控制数据生成的成本。该方法在状态维度递增的问题上进行了验证，结果表明二阶数据增强提高了近似精度和闭环性能，与低阶方法相比，所需训练样本数量最多减少了一个数量级。
AI.research_problem: 在高维确定性最优控制问题中，仅基于值函数值的回归方法样本复杂度高，难以高效近似值函数并恢复反馈控制律。
AI.key_innovation: 利用庞特里亚金最大值原理和矩阵黎卡提方程沿最优轨迹提取值函数的梯度和海森矩阵，将其作为额外约束增强稀疏多项式基上的加权最小二乘回归，并在高维下采用部分海森矩阵策略控制数据生成成本。
AI.motivation: 传统数据驱动方法仅使用值信息进行回归，样本需求大且难以扩展到高维问题；而最优性条件天然提供梯度和海森矩阵信息，可用于增强回归以降低样本复杂度。
AI.method: 从多个初始条件求解庞特里亚金最大值原理系统生成训练数据（值、梯度、海森矩阵），海森矩阵由沿最优轨迹的矩阵黎卡提方程获得；在双曲交叉指标集的稀疏多项式基上进行加权最小二乘回归，梯度和海森矩阵为每个样本提供额外线性方程；高维下采用部分海森矩阵策略；反馈控制律从学习到的值函数解析恢复。
AI.experiments: 在状态维度递增的最优控制问题上验证该方法，比较二阶数据增强与低阶方法在近似精度、闭环性能及样本需求方面的表现。
AI.result: 二阶数据增强显著提升了值函数近似精度和闭环控制性能，与低阶方法相比所需训练样本数量最多减少了一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 利用值函数的梯度和海森矩阵信息增强回归，可在高维最优控制问题中高效近似值函数并大幅降低样本复杂度，同时保持良好的闭环性能。
AI.limitations: 摘要未明确陈述局限性，但部分海森矩阵策略在高维下可能引入精度与成本之间的权衡，且方法依赖于能够求解庞特里亚金最优性系统以生成训练数据。

title: Uniform Sampling from High-dimensional Spectral Norm Balls
summary: Motivated by an application in machine learning optimization, this paper focuses on the challenges of sampling a matrix uniformly from the unit spectral norm ball. It is proven that all singular values of sampled matrices converge to 1 almost surely as the matrix dimensions increase. This result provides the theoretical justification for a proposed simple sampling method applicable for large dimension sizes matching matrices found in modern large language models. Experimental results demonstrate both the convergence of the singular values, as well as the exact and proposed approximate sampling methods.

AI.tldr: 证明单位谱范数球中均匀采样矩阵的奇异值随维度增大几乎必然收敛到1，为大维度矩阵采样提供理论依据。
AI.translated_summary: 受机器学习优化应用的启发，本文聚焦于从单位谱范数球中均匀采样矩阵的挑战。证明了当矩阵维度增大时，所采样矩阵的所有奇异值几乎必然收敛到1。该结果为一种适用于大维度尺寸（与现代大语言模型中的矩阵相匹配）的简单采样方法提供了理论依据。实验结果验证了奇异值的收敛性，以及精确采样方法和所提出的近似采样方法的有效性。
AI.research_problem: 如何从单位谱范数球中均匀采样矩阵，尤其是在大维度（如大语言模型中的矩阵）情况下的高效采样方法缺乏理论支撑。
AI.key_innovation: 证明了采样矩阵的所有奇异值在维度增大时几乎必然收敛到1，并据此提出了一种适用于大维度矩阵的简单采样方法。
AI.motivation: 机器学习优化中对大维度矩阵采样的实际需求，特别是现代大语言模型中涉及的矩阵规模。
AI.method: 理论证明奇异值渐近收敛性质，基于该性质提出一种简单的近似采样方法，适用于大维度矩阵。
AI.experiments: 通过实验验证了奇异值的收敛性，并对比展示了精确采样方法与所提出近似采样方法的效果。
AI.result: 实验结果证实了奇异值收敛到1的理论预测，且所提出的近似采样方法在大维度下有效。
AI.conclusion: 单位谱范数球中均匀采样矩阵的奇异值在高维下几乎必然趋于1，这为大规模矩阵的简单采样方法提供了理论依据和实验验证。

title: A periodic flow with high emergence
summary: We construct a smooth nonsingular periodic flow on a compact manifold with high emergence, in sharp contrast with the low statistical complexity of periodic self-maps. The construction is based on a modification of the Epstein--Vogt counterexample to the Periodic Orbit Conjecture and on the high-emergence mechanism of Berger--Bochi.

AI.tldr: 在紧流形上构造了具有高涌现性的光滑非奇异周期流，与周期自映射的低统计复杂性形成鲜明对比。
AI.translated_summary: 我们在紧流形上构造了一个具有高涌现性的光滑非奇异周期流，这与周期自映射的低统计复杂性形成了鲜明对比。该构造基于对Epstein-Vogt关于周期轨道猜想的反例的修改，以及Berger-Bochi的高涌现性机制。
AI.research_problem: 周期自映射具有较低的统计复杂性，那么光滑非奇异周期流是否能在紧流形上实现高涌现性，是一个尚未解决的问题。
AI.key_innovation: 通过对Epstein-Vogt周期轨道猜想反例进行修改，并结合Berger-Bochi的高涌现性机制，首次在紧流形上构造出具有高涌现性的光滑非奇异周期流。
AI.motivation: 周期自映射的统计复杂性较低，研究者希望探索在周期流（而非自映射）的框架下是否能实现高涌现性，从而揭示周期流与周期自映射在统计复杂度上的本质差异。
AI.method: 修改Epstein-Vogt针对周期轨道猜想的反例构造，并融合Berger-Bochi提出的高涌现性机制，在紧流形上构建光滑非奇异周期流。
AI.experiments: 本文为理论数学构造，无传统数值实验；核心验证在于构造本身的数学严格性。
AI.result: 成功构造出一个紧流形上的光滑非奇异周期流，该流具有高涌现性，与周期自映射的低统计复杂性形成鲜明对比。
AI.conclusion: 光滑非奇异周期流可以在紧流形上实现高涌现性，表明周期流与周期自映射在统计复杂性方面存在本质区别。

title: Trade-off invariance for weighted scalarizations in multi-objective optimization
summary: We consider weighted-sum scalarizations for an abstract multi-objective minimization problem defined by the vector-valued map $U\ni u\mapsto ( f_1(u),\ldots, f_N(u))$, where $U$ is an arbitrary nonempty set and no topology, convexity, compactness, or lower semicontinuity assumption is imposed. Using the open simplex as parameter space for positive weights, we show that the Trade-off Invariance Principle for scalarizations yields a generic uniqueness property in the objective space. Namely, for almost every weight vector, all minimizers of the corresponding weighted-sum scalarization have the same objective vector. Moreover, excluding again a null-measure subset, all minimizing sequences determine the same limiting objective vector, independently of the chosen sequence. We also give a geometric interpretation of these results in the attainable objective set: for almost every positive weight vector, the scalarization exposes at most one nondominated point. Moreover, minimizing sequences determine at most one asymptotically exposed objective vector in the closure of the attainable set.

AI.tldr: 在无拓扑和凸性假设的多目标优化中，加权和标量化对几乎所有权重向量具有目标空间唯一性。
AI.translated_summary: 我们考虑抽象多目标最小化问题的加权和标量化问题，该问题由向量值映射 $U\ni u\mapsto (f_1(u),\ldots, f_N(u))$ 定义，其中 $U$ 是任意非空集合，且不施加任何拓扑、凸性、紧性或下半连续性假设。利用开单纯形作为正权重的参数空间，我们证明了标量化的权衡不变性原理在目标空间中产生了一个通用的唯一性性质。即，对于几乎所有的权重向量，相应加权和标量化的所有最小化子具有相同的目标向量。此外，再次排除一个零测度子集后，所有最小化序列确定相同的极限目标向量，与所选序列无关。我们还在可达目标集中给出了这些结果的几何解释：对于几乎所有的正权重向量，标量化至多暴露一个非支配点。此外，最小化序列在可达集闭包中至多确定一个渐近暴露的目标向量。
AI.research_problem: 在多目标优化中，加权和标量化的最小化子是否具有唯一性性质，特别是在不施加任何拓扑、凸性、紧性或下半连续性假设的一般框架下。
AI.key_innovation: 利用开单纯形作为正权重的参数空间，通过权衡不变性原理证明在无任何常规假设的抽象多目标优化中，加权和标量化具有通用的目标空间唯一性性质。
AI.motivation: 多目标优化中的加权和标量化是经典方法，但在极弱假设条件下（无拓扑、凸性、紧性、下半连续性），其最小化子的唯一性性质尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 以开单纯形为正权重参数空间，应用标量化的权衡不变性原理，在目标空间和可达目标集中进行代数与几何分析。
AI.experiments: 本文为理论研究，无数值实验。
AI.result: 对几乎所有权重向量，加权和标量化的所有最小化子具有相同目标向量；排除零测度子集后，所有最小化序列确定相同的极限目标向量；几何上，标量化至多暴露一个非支配点，最小化序列至多确定一个渐近暴露目标向量。
AI.conclusion: 在极弱假设下，加权和标量化在目标空间中具有通用的唯一性性质，且具有清晰的几何解释。
AI.limitations: 论文为纯理论结果，未涉及数值实现或具体应用场景。

title: Ten Digits on a Train: AI-Assisted Verification of Two Eigenvalue Problems
summary: Accurate numerical eigenvalues are often difficult to certify, especially in singular or non-normal settings. This article reports a human--AI collaboration on two such computations. For a singular self-adjoint Schrödinger operator, a verified zero count and Dirichlet--Neumann bracketing certify the complete negative spectrum to ten decimal places. For a delicate non-normal atom--molecule benchmark, a previously unresolved resonance pair is separated, with each member enclosed to ten digits. The second result is achieved not by increasing the precision of one-way shooting, but by reformulating the problem as a global matching system for projective solution lines. The infinite tail is encoded as uncertainty in the terminal projective data, and a componentwise, tail-robust Krawczyk--Brouwer inclusion supplies the certificate. This gives a reusable architecture for analytic boundary-value systems with ill-conditioned propagation and uncertain asymptotic data. The collaboration also exposes the strengths and limits of AI assistance. AI rapidly produced accurate candidates and plausible proof strategies, but several failed, including one apparently complete tail argument that omitted the componentwise check required by a nonuniform polydisc. Validated computation is a stringent test of AI-assisted mathematics: the output is not merely a number, but a number with a proof. These examples show why the proof object matters, and why human mathematical judgment remained decisive. More broadly, as AI makes code, exposition, and plausible numerical claims inexpensive, standards for verification, attribution, peer review, and training must adapt. The implications are unsettling; the opportunity is extraordinary.

AI.tldr: 人机协作认证了奇异与非正规算子的特征值，揭示了AI辅助数学证明的优势与局限。
AI.translated_summary: 精确的数值特征值通常难以认证，特别是在奇异或非正规情形下。本文报告了在此类计算上的一次人机协作。对于奇异自伴Schrödinger算子，通过验证的零点计数和Dirichlet-Neumann括定，将完整的负谱认证到十位小数。对于一个精细的非正规原子-分子基准问题，分离了一对先前未解决的共振对，每个成员被限定到十位数字。第二个结果并非通过提高单向打靶精度实现，而是通过将问题重新表述为投影解线的全局匹配系统。无穷尾部被编码为终端投影数据中的不确定性，逐分量、尾部鲁棒的Krawczyk-Brouwer包含提供了认证。这为具有病态传播和不确定渐近数据的解析边值系统提供了可复用的架构。该协作还揭示了AI辅助的优势与局限。AI快速生成了精确的候选解和看似合理的证明策略，但若干策略失败了，包括一个看似完整的尾部论证，该论证遗漏了非均匀多圆盘所需的逐分量检验。验证计算是对AI辅助数学的严格测试：输出不仅仅是一个数，而是一个带有证明的数。这些例子说明了为什么证明对象很重要，以及为什么人类数学判断仍然是决定性的。更广泛地说，随着AI使代码、论述和看似合理的数值声明变得廉价，验证、归属、同行评审和培训的标准必须适应。其影响令人不安；机遇是非凡的。
AI.research_problem: 精确数值特征值在奇异或非正规情形下难以获得严格认证，尤其是如何为病态传播和不确定渐近数据的边值问题提供可验证的数学证明。
AI.key_innovation: 将非正规共振问题重新表述为投影解线的全局匹配系统，将无穷尾部编码为终端投影数据中的不确定性，并用逐分量、尾部鲁棒的Krawczyk-Brouwer包含提供认证，而非依赖提高单向打靶精度。
AI.motivation: 数值特征值的精确认证在奇异和非正规情形下具有根本性困难，同时AI辅助数学的兴起使得验证计算成为检验AI能力的严格测试——输出不仅是数，而是带证明的数。
AI.method: 对奇异自伴Schrödinger算子采用验证零点计数与Dirichlet-Neumann括定；对非正规原子-分子基准，将问题重构为投影解线全局匹配系统，以终端投影数据不确定性编码无穷尾部，用逐分量Krawczyk-Brouwer包含给出认证。整个过程为人机协作。
AI.experiments: 两个数值计算案例：(1)奇异自伴Schrödinger算子完整负谱的认证；(2)非正规原子-分子基准中先前未解决的共振对的分离与限定。同时记录了AI辅助过程中成功与失败的策略。
AI.result: 负谱被认证到十位小数；共振对每个成员被限定到十位数字。AI快速生成精确候选解和看似合理的证明策略，但若干策略失败，包括一个遗漏逐分量检验的尾部论证。人类数学判断在纠正这些错误中起决定性作用。
AI.conclusion: 验证计算是AI辅助数学的严格测试，证明对象至关重要，人类数学判断仍然决定性。随着AI降低代码与数值声明的成本，验证、归属、同行评审和培训的标准必须随之适应。
AI.limitations: AI生成的若干证明策略失败，表明其在严格数学证明方面仍有显著局限；论文也暗示验证标准、归属机制和培训体系的适应方案尚待进一步探索。

title: Computational Framework for Bézier Distributions
summary: Flexible continuous univariate distributions with bounded support are essential for accurate input modeling in stochastic simulation and decision analysis. Although Bézier distributions provide a powerful family capable of representing complex shapes, their adoption has been hindered by the lack of efficient fitting procedures and modern software implementations. This paper develops a computational framework for fitting Bézier distributions to empirical data via both minimum error and maximum likelihood estimation, leveraging first-order optimization methods and exploiting the geometry of the parameter space. We identify provably (asymptotically) lossless convex restrictions of the feasible set that enable efficient projection operators based on isotonic regression and develop first-order algorithms that reduce computational runtime by three to four orders of magnitude compared to traditional derivative-free methods, while delivering consistent fits across real-world data. When benchmarked against the nonlinear solver IPOPT, our methods prove three orders of magnitude faster on average and more robust, while achieving comparable accuracy. To bridge the gap between theory and practice, we introduce bezierv, an open-source Python package providing a unified interface for fitting, analyzing, and convolving Bézier distributions.

AI.tldr: 提出基于一阶优化的Bézier分布高效拟合框架，速度提升数千倍并开源Python包bezierv。
AI.translated_summary: 具有有界支撑的灵活连续单变量分布对于随机模拟和决策分析中的精确输入建模至关重要。尽管Bézier分布提供了一个能够表示复杂形状的强大分布族，但由于缺乏高效的拟合程序和现代软件实现，其应用受到了阻碍。本文开发了一个计算框架，通过最小误差和最大似然估计将Bézier分布拟合到经验数据，利用一阶优化方法并利用参数空间的几何特性。我们识别了可行集的可证明（渐近）无损凸约束，使得基于保序回归的高效投影算子成为可能，并开发了一阶算法，与传统的无导数方法相比，将计算运行时间减少了三到四个数量级，同时在真实数据上提供一致的拟合结果。与非线性求解器IPOPT相比，我们的方法平均快三个数量级且更鲁棒，同时达到相当的精度。为了弥合理论与实践之间的差距，我们引入了bezierv，一个开源Python包，提供用于拟合、分析和卷积Bézier分布的统一接口。
AI.research_problem: Bézier分布虽具备表示复杂形状的能力，但缺乏高效的拟合算法和现代软件实现，限制了其在实际输入建模中的应用。
AI.key_innovation: 利用参数空间几何特性识别可行集的渐近无损凸约束，基于保序回归构建高效投影算子，并开发一阶优化算法实现快速拟合。
AI.motivation: 随机模拟和决策分析需要灵活的有界支撑分布进行精确输入建模，Bézier分布能表示复杂形状但缺乏高效拟合手段，阻碍了其广泛采用。
AI.method: 通过最小误差和最大似然估计拟合Bézier分布；利用一阶优化方法；识别可行集的渐近无损凸约束；基于保序回归设计投影算子；开发一阶优化算法。
AI.experiments: 在真实数据上测试拟合一致性；与非线性求解器IPOPT进行基准对比，比较运行速度、鲁棒性和拟合精度。
AI.result: 相比传统无导数方法快3-4个数量级；相比IPOPT平均快3个数量级且更鲁棒，精度相当；在真实数据上拟合结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架大幅提升了Bézier分布拟合效率，开源包bezierv提供了统一的拟合、分析和卷积接口，有效弥合了理论与实践的差距。

title: On the stability of rarefaction for stochastic viscous conservation law
summary: We study the asymptotic stability of rarefaction waves for one-dimensional stochastic viscous conservation laws driven by nonlinear conservative noise. In a critical scaling where stochastic energy injection and viscous dissipation compete at comparable magnitudes, standard kinetic and viscosity frameworks encounter obstructions due to regularity gaps and non-integrable profiles. To address this, we introduce a stochastic area inequality controlling accumulated energy fluctuations, a local $L^1$ contraction principle via stochastic Kružkov doubling-of-variables that yields pathwise uniqueness without global integrability, and a modified Galerkin scheme preserving the $H^2$ energy structure. Assuming local $H^2$ regularity, we prove almost sure algebraic convergence to the rarefaction wave. For sufficiently small initial perturbations, we establish global well-posedness and sharp decay estimates in expectation. The smallness condition identifies a regime where viscous dissipation dominates stochastic injection, reflecting a structural stability threshold rather than a technical artifact. Our approach extends the analytical framework for conservative SPDEs with rough fluxes.

AI.tldr: 证明临界尺度下随机粘性守恒律稀疏波的渐近稳定性，建立整体适定性与衰减估计。
AI.translated_summary: 我们研究由非线性保守噪声驱动的一维随机粘性守恒律方程稀疏波的渐近稳定性。在随机能量注入与粘性耗散以可比量级竞争的临界尺度下，由于正则性差距和不可积轮廓，标准动力学和粘性框架遇到障碍。为此，我们引入了控制累积能量波动的随机面积不等式、通过随机Kružkov变量加倍方法得到的局部L^1收缩原理（在无需全局可积性的情况下实现逐路径唯一性），以及保持H^2能量结构的修正Galerkin格式。在假设局部H^2正则性的条件下，我们证明了几乎必然的代数收敛到稀疏波。对于充分小的初始扰动，我们建立了整体适定性和期望意义下的精确衰减估计。该小性条件确定了粘性耗散主导随机注入的参数区域，反映的是结构性稳定性阈值而非技术性人为限制。我们的方法推广了具有粗糙通量的保守随机偏微分方程的分析框架。
AI.research_problem: 在随机能量注入与粘性耗散量级相当的临界尺度下，标准动力学和粘性框架因正则性差距和不可积轮廓而无法处理稀疏波的渐近稳定性与适定性问题。
AI.key_innovation: 引入三个新工具：控制累积能量波动的随机面积不等式、基于随机Kružkov变量加倍的局部L^1收缩原理（无需全局可积性即获逐路径唯一性）、保持H^2能量结构的修正Galerkin格式。
AI.motivation: 临界尺度下保守随机偏微分方程的适定性与稳定性是开放问题，标准方法因正则性障碍失效，亟需发展新的分析工具以突破技术瓶颈。
AI.method: 结合随机面积不等式控制能量波动，利用随机Kružkov变量加倍建立局部L^1收缩原理，并通过保持H^2能量结构的修正Galerkin格式进行逼近，在局部H^2正则性假设下完成渐近分析。
AI.experiments: 本文为纯理论分析，无数值实验。
AI.result: 在局部H^2正则性假设下证明了几乎必然的代数收敛到稀疏波；对充分小初始扰动建立了整体适定性和期望意义下的精确衰减估计；小性条件对应结构性稳定性阈值而非技术限制。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功推广了具有粗糙通量的保守随机偏微分方程的分析框架，揭示了粘性耗散与随机注入竞争下的结构性稳定性阈值。
AI.limitations: 整体适定性结果仅对充分小初始扰动成立；渐近收敛依赖局部H^2正则性假设。

title: Flexible and Stable Dynamics Discovery with Onsager's Variational Principle
summary: Variational principles specify the dynamics of a physical system via the extremization of associated functional data. Onsager's variational principle (OVP), which characterizes dissipation-dominated phenomena such as phase separation, admits an unconditionally energy-stable time discretization through the minimization of a Rayleighan functional combining free energy and dissipative effects. The present work considers the case where one or more parts of this functional are empirically approximated or otherwise uncertain. To address this, a novel variational discretization of OVP is introduced which recovers previous work as a special case, and a learning problem is formulated which identifies uncertain terms in the free energy and dissipation potential from observable data. It is shown that the resulting OVP-based models connect directly to previous work in terms of proximal methods, Sobolev and Wasserstein gradient flows, while remaining provably energy-stable under arbitrarily long rollouts. The approach is illustrated on examples including Allen-Cahn, Fokker-Planck, and Cahn-Hilliard system models, where the effects of bulk free-energy densities, nonlocal potentials, and nonstandard boundary conditions are effectively learned with model classes consisting of polynomials, shallow neural networks, and spectral convolution kernels.

AI.tldr: 提出从数据中学习OVP泛函不确定项的变分离散方法，在任意长时间展开下保持能量稳定性。
AI.translated_summary: 变分原理通过极小化相关泛函数据来描述物理系统的动力学。Onsager变分原理（OVP）刻画了诸如相分离等耗散主导现象，通过最小化结合自由能和耗散效应的Rayleighian泛函，实现了无条件能量稳定的时间离散化。本文考虑该泛函中一个或多个部分被经验近似或存在不确定性的情形。为此，本文提出了一种新的OVP变分离散方法，将先前的工作作为特例包含其中，并构建了一个学习问题，从可观测数据中识别自由能和耗散势中的不确定项。研究表明，所得基于OVP的模型与先前关于近端方法、Sobolev和Wasserstein梯度流的工作直接相关，同时在任意长的时间展开下仍保持可证明的能量稳定性。该方法在Allen-Cahn、Fokker-Planck和Cahn-Hilliard系统模型等示例上进行了演示，其中体自由能密度、非局部势和非标准边界条件的效应通过多项式、浅层神经网络和谱卷积核等模型类被有效学习。
AI.research_problem: 当Onsager变分原理中的泛函（自由能或耗散势）存在经验近似或不确定性时，如何从可观测数据中识别这些不确定项，同时保持模型的无条件能量稳定性。
AI.key_innovation: 提出了一种新的OVP变分离散方法，将先前工作作为特例，并将其与近端方法、Sobolev和Wasserstein梯度流建立联系；同时构建了从可观测数据中学习自由能和耗散势中不确定项的学习问题，且在任意长时间展开下保持可证明的能量稳定性。
AI.motivation: Onsager变分原理为耗散主导现象提供了能量稳定的离散化框架，但实际应用中泛函的某些部分可能被经验近似或存在不确定性，需要一种数据驱动的方法来识别这些不确定项而不破坏能量稳定性。
AI.method: 提出新的OVP变分离散方法，将自由能和耗散势中的不确定项用多项式、浅层神经网络、谱卷积核等模型类参数化，通过从可观测数据中学习来识别这些不确定项，同时保持与近端方法、Sobolev和Wasserstein梯度流的联系及能量稳定性。
AI.experiments: 在Allen-Cahn、Fokker-Planck和Cahn-Hilliard系统模型上进行了验证，学习内容包括体自由能密度、非局部势和非标准边界条件的效应，模型类包括多项式、浅层神经网络和谱卷积核。
AI.result: 所提方法能有效学习泛函中的不确定项，所得模型在任意长时间展开下保持可证明的能量稳定性，并与近端方法、Sobolev和Wasserstein梯度流直接相关。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为存在不确定性的Onsager变分原理提供了一种数据驱动的建模框架，在保持能量稳定性的同时从观测数据中学习未知泛函项，适用于多种物理系统。

title: Suboptimal and Reduced-Order MPC via Timescale Separation
summary: In this paper, we propose a generalized framework for the design and analysis of suboptimal and reduced-order nonlinear Model Predictive Control (MPC) architectures. The proposed framework manages real-time operation of MPC schemes by (i) computing the control action suboptimally, i.e., by running a generic optimal control algorithm for a finite number of iterations, and (ii) relying on a reduced-order model that neglects part of the plant dynamics (accounting for, e.g., unmodeled dynamics or a low-level compensator). To rigorously handle the interplay between optimization error and model mismatch, we treat the sampling time as a tunable design parameter. We analyze the resulting closed-loop system, comprising the full-order physical plant interconnected with the iterative optimization algorithm (treated as a dynamical system), by leveraging tools from timescale separation. We prove that operating at a sufficiently fast sampling rate ensures that the closed-loop system maintains recursive feasibility and achieves an exponentially stable equilibrium point. The effectiveness of the proposed framework is validated on an underactuated two-link robotic arm through virtual experiments in the high-fidelity MuJoCo physics engine.

AI.tldr: 提出次优降阶非线性MPC的广义框架，将采样时间作为可调参数保证闭环指数稳定性。
AI.translated_summary: 本文提出了一种用于设计和分析次优与降阶非线性模型预测控制（MPC）架构的广义框架。该框架通过以下方式管理MPC方案的实时运行：（i）次优地计算控制作用，即运行通用最优控制算法有限次迭代，以及（ii）依赖忽略部分被控对象动态的降阶模型（例如考虑未建模动态或低层补偿器）。为严格处理优化误差与模型失配之间的相互作用，我们将采样时间视为可调设计参数。我们利用时间尺度分离工具分析了由此产生的闭环系统，该系统由全阶物理被控对象与迭代优化算法（视为动态系统）互联组成。我们证明了在足够快的采样率下运行可确保闭环系统保持递归可行性并实现指数稳定的平衡点。所提框架的有效性通过在高保真MuJoCo物理引擎中进行虚拟实验，在一个欠驱动双连杆机械臂上得到了验证。
AI.research_problem: 实时MPC应用中，当控制作用仅通过有限次迭代次优计算且采用降阶模型时，如何严格处理优化误差与模型失配的耦合作用并保证闭环系统的稳定性与可行性。
AI.key_innovation: 将采样时间作为可调设计参数来统一处理优化误差与模型失配的相互作用，并利用时间尺度分离理论将迭代优化算法视为动态系统，分析其与全阶被控对象互联的闭环系统。
AI.motivation: 实时MPC中完整优化和全阶模型往往不可行，需要次优计算与降阶模型，但二者引入的误差需要严格的理论保证。
AI.method: 提出广义框架，结合MPC的有限次迭代次优计算与降阶模型，将采样时间作为可调参数，利用时间尺度分离工具分析全阶被控对象与迭代优化算法互联的闭环系统。
AI.experiments: 在高保真MuJoCo物理引擎中对欠驱动双连杆机械臂进行虚拟实验验证。
AI.result: 理论证明在足够快的采样率下闭环系统保持递归可行性并实现指数稳定平衡点；虚拟实验验证了框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架能够在次优计算和降阶模型条件下，通过调节采样率保证非线性MPC闭环系统的递归可行性与指数稳定性。

title: Vekua-Type Operators on Compact Lie Groups: Hypoellipticity, Solvability, and Self-Duality
summary: We study global hypoellipticity and global solvability for Vekua-type operators associated with diagonal left-invariant operators on compact Lie groups. The conjugation term produces, on the Fourier side, a family of coupled systems whose determinants govern both regularity and solvability. Under a natural non-self-duality assumption, we obtain complete Diophantine-type characterizations of global hypoellipticity and global solvability, the latter on the natural space of admissible data. We then show how the theory must be modified in the self-dual setting by carrying out a complete analysis of the model case \(\mathbb S^3\simeq SU(2)\), where conjugation acts inside each representation block. The resulting criteria exhibit two Fourier-side mechanisms for Vekua-type operators on compact Lie groups: coupling between distinct conjugate representations and coupling inside self-dual representation blocks. We also present examples on product groups illustrating how these mechanisms may coexist and how global solvability may hold even when global hypoellipticity fails.

AI.tldr: 紧李群上Vekua型算子的全局亚椭圆性与可解性获完整Diophantine型刻画，揭示两种Fourier侧耦合机制。

title: Variational inference and density estimation with non-negative tensor of hierarchical tucker format
summary: In this work, we present an efficient method to compress a high-dimensional discrete probability function, i.e., a probability tensor, into a non-negative hierarchical Tucker format. The methodology is a two-stage procedure. In the first stage, we take an existing interpolation method to compress the target tensor into a hierarchical Tucker (HT) in a manner similar to the CUR decomposition for low-rank matrix reconstruction. In the second stage, we fit the first-stage output against a non-negative hierarchical Tucker ansatz using a second-order method tailored specifically for this setting. When the tensor is of order \(d\), both stages admit an \(\mathcal{O}(d)\) computational complexity, and therefore the proposed methodology readily extends into high-dimensional settings. Numerical experiments show success in compressing various high-dimensional probability tensors.

AI.tldr: 提出两阶段方法将高维概率张量压缩为非负层次Tucker格式，计算复杂度为O(d)。
AI.translated_summary: 在本文中，我们提出了一种高效的方法，将高维离散概率函数（即概率张量）压缩为非负层次Tucker格式。该方法是一个两阶段过程。在第一阶段，我们采用现有的插值方法，以类似于低秩矩阵重构中CUR分解的方式，将目标张量压缩为层次Tucker（HT）格式。在第二阶段，我们使用专门针对此场景设计的二阶方法，将第一阶段输出拟合到非负层次Tucker假设上。当张量的阶数为d时，两个阶段的计算复杂度均为O(d)，因此该方法可方便地推广到高维场景。数值实验表明该方法在压缩各种高维概率张量方面取得了成功。

title: Constrained Variable Projection for Structured Problems
summary: Variable projection is a classical technique for separable nonlinear least-squares problems, in which variables that enter linearly are eliminated exactly, yielding a reduced nonlinear problem. By expressing this framework as a particular instance of a broader class of bilevel optimization problems, we develop a constrained variable-projection framework for data-science models, where the remaining variables are subject to convex constraints and the eliminated variables arise from a lower-level least-squares problem. In particular, by interpreting variable projection as a collapsed bilevel optimization problem, we derive exact reduced-gradient formulas compatible with automatic differentiation and propose a conditional-gradient algorithm for the resulting constrained reduced problem. We establish convergence guarantees under standard smoothness and compactness assumptions, and discuss extensions to structured lower-level variables. Numerical experiments on sparse autoencoding, dictionary learning, blind deconvolution, and few-shot learning suggest that the method can improve wall-clock efficiency and data efficiency relative to natural joint-optimization baselines.

AI.tldr: 将变量投影重构为双层优化问题，提出约束变量投影框架以提升数据科学模型的优化效率。
AI.translated_summary: 变量投影是求解可分离非线性最小二乘问题的经典技术，其中线性进入的变量被精确消去，从而得到一个降维的非线性问题。通过将这一框架表达为一类更广泛的双层优化问题的特定实例，我们为数据科学模型开发了一种约束变量投影框架，其中剩余变量受凸约束限制，而被消去的变量来自下层最小二乘问题。特别地，通过将变量投影解释为坍缩的双层优化问题，我们推导出了与自动微分兼容的精确降维梯度公式，并针对所得的约束降维问题提出了一种条件梯度算法。我们在标准光滑性和紧致性假设下建立了收敛性保证，并讨论了对结构化下层变量的扩展。在稀疏自编码、字典学习、盲反卷积和小样本学习上的数值实验表明，该方法相对于自然的联合优化基线可以提高实际运行效率和数据效率。
AI.research_problem: 经典变量投影技术仅适用于无约束的可分离非线性最小二乘问题，无法直接处理数据科学模型中常见的凸约束场景，且缺乏与自动微分兼容的精确降维梯度计算方法。
AI.key_innovation: 将变量投影解释为坍缩的双层优化问题，推导出与自动微分兼容的精确降维梯度公式，并提出条件梯度算法求解约束降维问题。
AI.motivation: 变量投影是经典优化技术但应用范围有限，而数据科学模型中常涉及凸约束，需要将变量投影扩展到约束场景以提升优化效率。
AI.method: 将变量投影表达为双层优化问题的特例，推导精确降维梯度公式，提出条件梯度算法求解约束降维问题，并在标准光滑性和紧致性假设下建立收敛性保证，同时讨论对结构化下层变量的扩展。

title: Optimal Couplings of Levy Processes in the Class of Immersion Couplings
summary:
We study the optimal coupling problem for Levy processes on R^d with respect to the quadratic cost. For any two such processes with finite second moments, we prove that the optimal Levy coupling constructed in Kang and Lim (2025), which was previously shown to be optimal among Feller couplings, is in fact optimal among the larger class of immersion couplings. The proof makes use of a characterization of immersion couplings, which is equivalent to the classical martingale preservation definition but more convenient for our purposes.
  The construction is based on two fundamental ingredients: the existence of an optimal coupling within the class of Levy couplings, and a dual formulation of the associated optimization problem. While both results were previously established in Kang and Lim (2025), we provide here simpler and more transparent proofs relying only on optimal transport between infinitely divisible measures and a generalized minimax principle. These arguments are self-contained and may be of independent interest.

AI.tldr: 证明最优Lévy耦合在浸入耦合类中亦为最优，并给出更简洁自包含的证明。
AI.translated_summary: 我们研究R^d上Lévy过程关于二次成本的最优耦合问题。对于任意两个具有有限二阶矩的此类过程，我们证明了Kang和Lim（2025）中构造的最优Lévy耦合——此前已被证明在Feller耦合类中最优——实际上在更大的浸入耦合类中也是最优的。证明利用了浸入耦合的一个刻画，该刻画等价于经典的鞅保持定义，但更便于我们的目的。该构造基于两个基本要素：Lévy耦合类中最优耦合的存在性，以及相关优化问题的对偶表述。虽然这两个结果此前已在Kang和Lim（2025）中建立，但我们在此提供了更简单、更透明的证明，仅依赖于无穷可分测度之间的最优传输和广义极小极大原理。这些论证是自包含的，可能具有独立的意义。
AI.research_problem: Lévy过程关于二次成本的最优耦合问题中，Kang和Lim（2025）构造的最优Lévy耦合此前仅在Feller耦合类中被证明最优，其在更大的浸入耦合类中的最优性尚未确立。
AI.key_innovation: 证明最优Lévy耦合在更大的浸入耦合类中仍然最优，并提供了仅依赖无穷可分测度间最优传输和广义极小极大原理的更简洁、自包含的证明。
AI.motivation: 将最优Lévy耦合的最优性从Feller耦合类扩展到更大的浸入耦合类，同时简化已有证明使其更加透明和自包含。
AI.method: 利用浸入耦合的一个等价于经典鞅保持定义但更便利的刻画，结合无穷可分测度之间的最优传输理论和广义极小极大原理进行证明。
AI.experiments: 本文为理论研究，无实验部分。
AI.result: 证明了Kang和Lim（2025）构造的最优Lévy耦合在浸入耦合类中是最优的，且所提供的证明比原有证明更简单透明。

title: Regularity for Minimizers of non Autonomous Singular Functionals with Anisotropic Growth
summary: We establish the higher differentiability of the local minimizers to a class of non autonomous convex integral functionals satisfying anisotropic subquadratic growth conditions, that include, as a particular case, those with orthotropic structure. The result is obtained under a gap bound on the exponents \(p_i\), that guarantees the local boundedness of the minimizers and under a suitable Sobolev assumption on the map that measures the oscillation of the energy density with respect to the $x$ variable, that is independent on the dimension.

AI.tldr: 在间隙界和与维数无关的Sobolev振荡假设下建立各向异性次二次泛函极小值的高阶可微性。
AI.translated_summary: 我们建立了一类满足各向异性次二次增长条件的非自治凸积分泛函局部极小值的高阶可微性，该类泛函包括正交各向异性结构作为特殊情形。该结果是在对指数p_i施加间隙界（保证极小值的局部有界性）以及对衡量能量密度关于x变量振荡的映射施加适当的Sobolev假设（该假设与维数无关）的条件下获得的。
AI.research_problem: 非自治各向异性凸积分泛函（含正交各向异性结构）在次二次增长条件下局部极小值的高阶可微性尚未在充分一般的条件下建立。
AI.key_innovation: 在对指数p_i施加间隙界以保证局部有界性，同时对能量密度关于x变量的振荡映射施加与维数无关的Sobolev假设，在此条件下建立了极小值的高阶可微性。
AI.motivation: 各向异性增长条件下的正则性理论是变分法中的核心问题，非自治情形下极小值的高阶可微性结果尚不完善，尤其在次二次增长和正交各向异性结构下需要更一般的条件。
AI.method: 通过对指数p_i施加间隙界保证极小值的局部有界性，并结合对衡量能量密度关于x变量振荡的映射施加与维数无关的Sobolev正则性假设，推导高阶可微性结论。
AI.experiments: 本文为纯理论结果，无数值实验。
AI.result: 成功建立了一类满足各向异性次二次增长条件的非自治凸积分泛函（包括正交各向异性结构作为特殊情形）局部极小值的高阶可微性。
AI.conclusion: 在指数间隙界和与维数无关的Sobolev振荡假设下，各向异性次二次增长凸积分泛函的局部极小值具有高阶可微性。

title: A Lorentzian Lasry-Lions regularization theorem
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2511.05227
summary: The main goal of this paper is to establish a general Lorentzian Lasry-Lions regularization theorem: let $u$ be a function defined on a globally hyperbolic spacetime. Assume that its forward Lax--Oleinik evolution $Tu$ is locally semiconcave in a neighbourhood of $(t_0,y_0)$ and has future-directed timelike superdifferentials there. Then, for $t$ close to $t_0$ and sufficiently small $s>0$, the function $\hat T_s\circ T_tu$ is of class $C_{\mathrm{loc}}^{1,1}$ in a neighbourhood of $y_0$. We give sufficient conditions ensuring the assumptions of the theorem and present an application to optimal transport: under quite general assumptions, for any two intermediate measures along a displacement interpolation, there exists a $C^{1,1}_{loc}$-regular maximizing pair in the dual formulation.

AI.tldr: 建立了整体双曲时空上的洛伦兹Lasry-Lions正则化定理，并应用于最优传输对偶问题的正则性。
AI.translated_summary: 本文的主要目标是建立一个一般的洛伦兹Lasry-Lions正则化定理：设u是定义在整体双曲时空上的函数。假设其前向Lax-Oleinik演化Tu在(t₀,y₀)的邻域内是局部半凹的，并且在该处具有未来指向的类时超微分。那么，对于接近t₀的t和充分小的s>0，函数T̂_s∘T_tu在y₀的邻域内属于C^{1,1}_loc类。我们给出了确保定理假设成立的充分条件，并给出了在最优传输中的应用：在相当一般的假设下，对于位移插值沿线的任意两个中间测度，在对偶表述中存在一个C^{1,1}_loc正则的极大化对。
AI.research_problem: 在洛伦兹几何框架下建立一般的Lasry-Lions正则化定理，并将正则性结果应用于洛伦兹最优传输的对偶问题。
AI.key_innovation: 在整体双曲时空上，利用前向Lax-Oleinik演化的局部半凹性与类时超微分条件，证明复合算子T̂_s∘T_tu具有C^{1,1}_loc正则性，并将此结果应用于最优传输对偶问题中极大化对的正则性。
AI.motivation: 经典Lasry-Lions正则化理论需要在洛伦兹几何框架下进行推广，以期为洛伦兹最优传输问题提供正则性保证。
AI.method: 在整体双曲时空上分析前向Lax-Oleinik演化算子Tu的局部半凹性与类时超微分性质，通过复合算子T̂_s∘T_tu在时间参数接近且s充分小时获得正则性提升；随后给出充分条件的验证并将其应用于最优传输对偶表述。
AI.result: 证明了在t接近t₀且s>0充分小时，T̂_s∘T_tu在y₀邻域内属于C^{1,1}_loc类；在最优传输应用中，位移插值沿线的任意两个中间测度之间存在C^{1,1}_loc正则的极大化对。
AI.conclusion: 成功建立了洛伦兹框架下的一般Lasry-Lions正则化定理，给出了充分条件并在最优传输对偶问题中获得了C^{1,1}_loc正则极大化对的存在性。

title: Reinforcement learning with learned gadgets to tackle hard quantum problems on real hardware
summary: Abstract Quantum computing offers exciting opportunities for simulating complex quantum systems and optimizing large-scale combinatorial problems, but its practical use is limited by device noise and constrained connectivity. Designing quantum circuits, which are fundamental to quantum algorithms, is therefore a central challenge in current quantum hardware. Existing reinforcement learning-based methods for circuit design lose accuracy when restricted to hardware-native gates and device-level compilation. Here, we introduce gadget reinforcement learning (GRL) that combines learning with program synthesis to automatically construct composite gates that expand the action space while respecting hardware constraints. We show that this approach improves accuracy, hardware compatibility, and scalability for transverse-field Ising and quantum chemistry problems, reaching systems of up to ten qubits within realistic computational budgets. This framework demonstrates how learned, reusable circuit building blocks can guide the co-design of algorithms and hardware for quantum processors.

AI.tldr: 提出GRL方法，结合强化学习与程序合成自动构造复合门，提升量子电路设计的精度与硬件兼容性。
AI.translated_summary: 量子计算为模拟复杂量子系统和优化大规模组合问题提供了令人兴奋的机遇，但其实际应用受到器件噪声和受限连接性的制约。设计量子电路（量子算法的基础）因此成为当前量子硬件面临的核心挑战。现有的基于强化学习的电路设计方法在限制为硬件原生门和器件级编译时会损失精度。为此，我们提出了器件强化学习（GRL），该方法将学习与程序合成相结合，自动构造复合门，在遵守硬件约束的同时扩展动作空间。我们证明该方法在横场伊辛模型和量子化学问题上提升了精度、硬件兼容性和可扩展性，在现实的计算预算下可处理多达十个量子比特的系统。该框架展示了学习到的可复用电路构建模块如何指导量子处理器的算法与硬件协同设计。
AI.research_problem: 现有基于强化学习的量子电路设计方法在限制为硬件原生门和器件级编译时精度下降，难以在硬件约束下同时保证准确性和可扩展性。
AI.key_innovation: 提出GRL方法，将强化学习与程序合成结合，自动构造复合门（gadget），在尊重硬件约束的同时扩展动作空间，使学习到的可复用电路模块指导算法与硬件的协同设计。
AI.motivation: 量子计算的实际应用受限于器件噪声和受限连接性，量子电路设计是当前量子硬件的核心挑战，需要兼顾硬件兼容性与设计精度。

journal: Frontiers in Applied Mathematics and Statistics
title: Applicability of the Analytical Solution to N-Person Social Dilemma Games
summary: The purpose of this study is to present an analysis of the applicability of an analytical solution to the N−person social dilemma game. Such solution has been earlier developed for Pavlovian agents in a cellular automaton environment with linear payoff functions and also been verified using agent based simulation. However, no discussion has been offered for the applicability of this result in all Prisoners' Dilemma game scenarios or in other N−person social dilemma games such as Chicken or Stag Hunt. In this paper it is shown that the analytical solution works in all social games where the linear payoff functions are such that each agent's cooperating probability fluctuates around the analytical solution without cooperating or defecting with certainty. The social game regions where this determination holds are explored by varying payoff function parameters. It is found by both simulation and a special method that the analytical solution applies best in Chicken when the payoff parameter S is slightly negative and then the analytical solution slowly degrades as S becomes more negative. It turns out that the analytical solution is only a good estimate for Prisoners' Dilemma games and again becomes worse as S becomes more negative. A sensitivity analysis is performed to determine the impact of different initial cooperating probabilities, learning factors, and neighborhood size.

AI.tldr: 解析解在N人社会困境博弈中的适用性因博弈类型和收益参数而异，胆小鬼博弈中表现最佳。
AI.translated_summary: 本研究的目的是分析解析解在N人社会困境博弈中的适用性。该解析解此前针对元胞自动机环境中具有线性收益函数的巴甫洛夫型智能体提出，并通过基于智能体的仿真进行了验证。然而，此前并未讨论该结果在所有囚徒困境博弈场景或其他N人社会困境博弈（如胆小鬼博弈或猎鹿博弈）中的适用性。本文证明，当线性收益函数使得每个智能体的合作概率围绕解析解波动、而非确定性地合作或背叛时，该解析解在所有社会博弈中均有效。通过改变收益函数参数，本文探索了该判定成立的社会博弈区域。仿真和一种特殊方法均发现，解析解在胆小鬼博弈中当收益参数S略为负值时适用性最佳，随着S变得更负，解析解的适用性缓慢下降。对于囚徒困境博弈，解析解仅是一个较好的估计，且同样随S变得更负而变差。此外还进行了敏感性分析，以确定不同初始合作概率、学习因子和邻域大小的影响。
AI.research_problem: 此前提出的针对巴甫洛夫型智能体的解析解虽已通过仿真验证，但其在所有囚徒困境场景及其他N人社会困境博弈（如胆小鬼博弈、猎鹿博弈）中的适用性尚未被讨论。
AI.key_innovation: 证明了当线性收益函数使合作概率围绕解析解波动而非确定性合作或背叛时，解析解在所有社会博弈中均有效，并系统探索了该判定成立的博弈参数区域。
AI.motivation: 已有解析解仅在线性收益函数的元胞自动机环境中针对巴甫洛夫型智能体得到验证，缺乏对其在不同社会困境博弈类型和参数范围下适用性的系统分析。
AI.method: 通过改变收益函数参数探索解析解适用的博弈区域，结合仿真与一种特殊方法进行验证，并对初始合作概率、学习因子和邻域大小进行敏感性分析。
AI.experiments: 在胆小鬼博弈和囚徒困境博弈中，通过改变收益参数S进行仿真和特殊方法验证；对初始合作概率、学习因子和邻域大小进行敏感性分析。
AI.result: 解析解在胆小鬼博弈中S略为负值时适用性最佳，随S变负缓慢下降；在囚徒困境博弈中仅为较好估计，同样随S变负而变差。
AI.conclusion: 解析解的适用性取决于博弈类型和收益参数：在胆小鬼博弈中表现最佳，在囚徒困境中仅为近似估计，且均随参数S变负而退化。

title: Restoring the Fluctuation–Dissipation Theorem in Kardar–Parisi–Zhang Universality Class through a New Emergent Fractal Dimension
summary: The Kardar–Parisi–Zhang (KPZ) equation describes a wide range of growth-like phenomena, with applications in physics, chemistry and biology. There are three central questions in the study of KPZ growth: the determination of height probability distributions; the search for ever more precise universal growth exponents; and the apparent absence of a fluctuation–dissipation theorem (FDT) for spatial dimension d > 1 . Notably, these questions were answered exactly only for 1 + 1 dimensions. In this work, we propose a new FDT valid for the KPZ problem in d + 1 dimensions. This is achieved by rearranging terms and identifying a new correlated noise which we argue to be characterized by a fractal dimension d n . We present relations between the KPZ exponents and two emergent fractal dimensions, namely d f , of the rough interface, and d n . Also, we simulate KPZ growth to obtain values for transient versions of the roughness exponent α , the surface fractal dimension d f and, through our relations, the noise fractal dimension d n . Our results indicate that KPZ may have at least two fractal dimensions and that, within this proposal, an FDT is restored. Finally, we provide new insights into the old question about the upper critical dimension of the KPZ universality class.

AI.tldr: 提出适用于d+1维KPZ方程的新涨落-耗散定理，揭示KPZ具有至少两个分形维数。
AI.translated_summary: Kardar-Parisi-Zhang（KPZ）方程描述了广泛的生长类现象，在物理学、化学和生物学中有重要应用。KPZ生长研究中有三个核心问题：高度概率分布的确定；寻找更精确的普适生长指数；以及空间维度d > 1时涨落-耗散定理（FDT）的明显缺失。值得注意的是，这些问题仅在1+1维中得到了精确解答。在本工作中，我们提出了一种适用于d+1维KPZ问题的新FDT。这是通过重新排列项并识别一种新的关联噪声来实现的，我们认为该噪声由分形维数d_n表征。我们给出了KPZ指数与两个涌现分形维数之间的关系，即粗糙界面的d_f和d_n。此外，我们模拟了KPZ生长，获得了粗糙指数α、表面分形维数d_f的瞬态版本值，并通过我们的关系得到了噪声分形维数d_n。我们的结果表明，KPZ可能具有至少两个分形维数，并且在此框架下，FDT得以恢复。最后，我们对KPZ普适类的上临界维度这一古老问题提供了新的见解。
AI.research_problem: KPZ方程的三个核心问题（高度概率分布、普适生长指数、d>1维时FDT缺失）仅在1+1维得到精确解答，高维情况下FDT的存在性及其与KPZ指数的关系尚不清楚。
AI.key_innovation: 通过重新排列KPZ方程项并识别一种新的关联噪声（以分形维数d_n表征），建立了KPZ指数与两个涌现分形维数（界面分形维数d_f和噪声分形维数d_n）之间的关系，从而在d+1维中恢复了FDT。
AI.motivation: KPZ方程广泛应用于多个学科，但高维情形下FDT缺失是长期未解的核心问题，亟需将仅在1+1维成立的精确结果推广到更高维度。
AI.method: 重新排列KPZ方程项，识别新的关联噪声并引入噪声分形维数d_n，推导KPZ指数与d_f、d_n之间的解析关系，并通过数值模拟验证。
AI.experiments: 模拟KPZ生长过程，测量粗糙指数α和表面分形维数d_f的瞬态值，再通过所推导的理论关系计算噪声分形维数d_n。
AI.result: 模拟结果支持KPZ具有至少两个分形维数的假设，在所提框架下FDT在高维中得以恢复。
AI.conclusion: 提出的新FDT框架成功将涨落-耗散关系推广至d+1维KPZ问题，揭示了KPZ的分形维数结构，并为KPZ普适类上临界维度的长期问题提供了新见解。
AI.limitations: 摘要中仅报告了瞬态版本的指数值，未明确给出渐近行为；结果基于模拟与理论论证，非精确解析解；上临界维度问题仅提供新见解而未给出确定性结论。

title: Quantitative Homogenization of PDEs with Neumann boundary conditions: a probabilistic approach
summary: In this paper, we study quantitative homogenization for viscosity solutions of multi-scale semilinear second order partial differential equations (PDEs) on convex domains with Neumann boundary conditions. To this aim we use the probabilistic approach by studying the quantitative homogenization of backward stochastic differential equations (SDEs) associated with slow-fast systems of reflected SDEs.

AI.tldr: 用概率方法研究凸域上多尺度半线性PDE粘性解的定量均匀化。
AI.translated_summary: 本文研究了具有Neumann边界条件的凸区域上多尺度半线性二阶偏微分方程（PDE）粘性解的定量均匀化问题。为此，我们采用概率方法，通过研究与反射随机微分方程（SDE）慢-快系统相关联的倒向随机微分方程的定量均匀化来实现这一目标。
AI.research_problem: 凸区域上带Neumann边界条件的多尺度半线性二阶PDE粘性解的定量均匀化问题缺乏系统研究。
AI.key_innovation: 将概率方法引入该问题，通过研究慢-快反射SDE系统关联的倒向随机微分方程的定量均匀化来解决PDE的均匀化问题。
AI.motivation: 多尺度半线性PDE在带Neumann边界条件的凸区域上的定量均匀化是一个重要但尚未充分解决的问题，需要新的分析工具。
AI.method: 采用概率方法，建立慢-快反射SDE系统与倒向SDE的联系，通过对倒向SDE的定量均匀化分析来推导PDE粘性解的均匀化结果。
AI.result: 通过概率方法成功建立了多尺度半线性PDE粘性解的定量均匀化理论框架。
AI.conclusion: 概率方法为凸域上带Neumann边界条件的多尺度半线性PDE的定量均匀化提供了有效的研究途径。

title: Rigidity of McMullen Julia sets
summary: We provide a complete quasisymmetric classification of the Julia sets of postcritically finite McMullen maps $f_λ(z)=z^n+λ/z^n$ with $λ\in\mathbb{C}^*$ and $n\geq 2$, and prove that the quasisymmetry group of each such Julia set is exactly the finite dihedral group generated by the natural symmetries of the map. These results establish quasisymmetric rigidity for all topological classes in this family, including Sierpiński-like carpets, necklaces, and clusters, and provide the first known examples of rigid Julia sets in each of the three classes.

AI.tldr: 完成了McMullen映射Julia集的拟对称分类，证明其拟对称群恰为有限二面体群。
AI.translated_summary: 我们给出了后临界有限McMullen映射$f_λ(z)=z^n+λ/z^n$（其中$λ\in\mathbb{C}^*$，$n\geq 2$）的Julia集的完整拟对称分类，并证明了每个此类Julia集的拟对称群恰好是由映射的自然对称性生成的有限二面体群。这些结果对该族中所有拓扑类——包括类Sierpiński地毯、项链和簇——建立了拟对称刚性，并提供了这三个类别中刚性Julia集的首批已知实例。
AI.research_problem: 后临界有限McMullen映射的Julia集的拟对称分类问题此前未被完整解决，尤其是各类拓扑类型（地毯、项链、簇）的拟对称刚性与否尚不明确。
AI.key_innovation: 完整刻画了该映射族所有拓扑类的拟对称群，证明其恰为有限二面体群，从而建立了拟对称刚性，并首次在三类拓扑结构中给出刚性Julia集的实例。
AI.motivation: 理解McMullen映射Julia集的拟对称结构，判定其是否具有刚性，是复动力系统中拟对称分类的核心问题之一。
AI.method: 通过复动力系统与拟共形几何的理论分析，结合后临界有限映射的拓扑分类，对拟对称群进行精确刻画与证明。
AI.result: 每个后临界有限McMullen映射Julia集的拟对称群恰好等于由映射自然对称性生成的有限二面体群，三类拓扑结构均满足拟对称刚性。
AI.conclusion: 该族映射的所有拓扑类均具有拟对称刚性，且首次在类Sierpiński地毯、项链和簇三类中获得了刚性Julia集的实例。

title: Obstacles and Singularities of Riemannian Distance Functions
summary: We study the distance function from a point target in the complement of a compact obstacle endowed with a smooth Riemannian metric. We prove that the obstacle necessarily generates singularities of the distance function: every sufficiently high level set contains a singular point. We also show that every singular point outside the obstacle belongs to a nontrivial Lipschitz arc of singularities, thereby extending to the constrained setting classical propagation results for Hamilton--Jacobi equations. Finally, we provide examples showing that these results are essentially sharp, including a nonconvex obstacle for which the distance function is differentiable at every boundary point.

AI.tldr: 障碍物必然导致距离函数产生奇点，且奇点沿非平凡Lipschitz弧传播。
AI.translated_summary: 我们研究在赋予光滑黎曼度量的紧致障碍物补集中，从点目标出发的距离函数。我们证明障碍物必然产生距离函数的奇点：每个充分高的水平集都包含一个奇点。我们还证明障碍物外的每个奇点都属于一个非平凡的Lipschitz奇点弧，从而将Hamilton-Jacobi方程的经典传播结果推广到约束情形。最后，我们给出例子说明这些结果本质上是精确的，包括一个非凸障碍物，其距离函数在每个边界点处都是可微的。
AI.research_problem: 在带有紧致障碍物约束的黎曼流形上，距离函数的奇点是否必然存在、如何传播，以及经典Hamilton-Jacobi方程奇点传播理论能否推广到约束情形。
AI.key_innovation: 证明了障碍物必然产生距离函数奇点（每个充分高水平集含奇点），且障碍物外每个奇点属于非平凡Lipschitz奇点弧，将经典传播结果推广至约束设定。
AI.motivation: 理解障碍物对距离函数奇点结构的强制性影响，并将Hamilton-Jacobi方程的经典奇点传播理论拓展到有障碍物约束的几何场景。
AI.method: 在紧致障碍物补集上赋予光滑黎曼度量，分析距离函数水平集的奇点存在性与奇点沿Lipschitz弧的传播性质，并构造具体例子验证结论的精确性。
AI.experiments: 构造了多个例子验证结果的不可改进性，包括一个非凸障碍物情形，其距离函数在每个边界点处均可微。
AI.result: 证明了每个充分高的水平集必含奇点；障碍物外每个奇点属于非平凡Lipschitz奇点弧；所给例子表明这些结论本质上是精确的。
AI.conclusion: 障碍物必然诱导距离函数奇点的产生与传播，经典Hamilton-Jacobi奇点传播理论可推广至约束情形，且相关结论在本质上是不可改进的。

title: Computing the minimal monomial basis for multivariate Birkhoff interpolation
summary: This paper studies algorithms for computing the minimal monomial basis for multivariate Birkhoff interpolation problems. Our approach is built around the notion of a reverse reduced set, which serves as the key tool for bridging the interpolation conditions to the monomial basis, thereby avoiding the construction and evaluation of Vandermonde matrices required in existing algorithms. For the single-node case, we prove that after Gaussian elimination on the incidence matrix, the least monomials of the polynomial set corresponding to the interpolation conditions precisely constitute the minimal monomial basis. To handle the multi-node case, we exploit the one-to-one correspondence between interpolation functionals and formal power series, whereby interpolation conditions at arbitrary nonzero nodes can all be converted to the origin. This provides both a coherent theoretical framework and a constructive algorithm for determining a proper minimal monomial basis for the general multivariate Birkhoff interpolation problem. Numerical examples demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm.

AI.tldr: 提出基于反向约简集的算法，避免Vandermonde矩阵构造，求解多元Birkhoff插值最小单项式基。
AI.translated_summary: 本文研究计算多元Birkhoff插值问题最小单项式基的算法。我们的方法围绕反向约简集的概念构建，该概念作为将插值条件与单项式基联系起来的关键工具，从而避免了现有算法中所需的Vandermonde矩阵的构造和求值。对于单节点情形，我们证明了在对关联矩阵进行高斯消元后，与插值条件对应的多项式集合的最小单项式恰好构成最小单项式基。为处理多节点情形，我们利用插值泛函与形式幂级数之间的一一对应关系，将任意非零节点处的插值条件全部转化为原点处的条件。这为确定一般多元Birkhoff插值问题的适当最小单项式基提供了连贯的理论框架和构造性算法。数值算例验证了所提算法的有效性。
AI.research_problem: 多元Birkhoff插值问题中最小单项式基的计算问题，现有算法需要构造和求值Vandermonde矩阵，计算开销大且缺乏统一理论框架。
AI.key_innovation: 引入反向约简集概念作为连接插值条件与单项式基的关键工具，并利用插值泛函与形式幂级数的一一对应关系，将多节点插值条件统一转化为原点条件，从而避免Vandermonde矩阵的构造与求值。
AI.motivation: 现有算法依赖Vandermonde矩阵的构造和求值，计算复杂度高，且缺乏处理一般多元Birkhoff插值问题的统一理论框架。
AI.method: 1）引入反向约简集概念桥接插值条件与单项式基；2）单节点情形下对关联矩阵进行高斯消元，证明对应多项式集合的最小单项式构成最小单项式基；3）多节点情形下利用插值泛函与形式幂级数的一一对应，将非零节点条件转化为原点条件。
AI.experiments: 通过数值算例验证所提算法的有效性。
AI.result: 数值算例表明所提算法能够有效计算多元Birkhoff插值问题的最小单项式基。
AI.conclusion: 本文为一般多元Birkhoff插值问题提供了连贯的理论框架和构造性算法，可确定适当的最小单项式基，无需构造Vandermonde矩阵。

title: Traveling profiles and control cost for a PDE describing the evolution of invasive species
summary: We develop a detailed analysis of optimal traveling waves $U(t,x) = U(x - βt)$ for a model of invasive-species control proposed in [Bressan, Chiri, and Salehi, Math. Models Methods Appl. Sci., 2022] : the relative density $U \in [0,1]$ of the invasive species satisfies the following reaction-diffusion equation with a positive control \begin{equation} \label{Equa:PDE_abstract} U_t = U_{xx} + f(U) - \tilde α(t,x) U, \quad U \in [0,1], \ \tilde α\geq 0. \end{equation} The control $\tilde α(t,x)$ represents the fraction of the population removed at $(t,x)$: the minimal control effort $E(β,f)$ required to sustain a traveling invasion front with prescribed speed $β$ is defined as the minimal $L^1$-norm of $\tilde α$ for a traveling wave solution $U(x-βt)$ to the PDE. In order to study large scale dynamics $(t,x) \mapsto (εt,εx)$, a fundamental role is played by the structure of traveling waves and the convexity and regularity properties of $E$. The main results of this paper are the following: 1)In the phase plane $(U,P=U_x)$, there exists a unique optimal profile $P_β(U)$ minimizing the effort; 2) It satisfies explicit first-order conditions, which are both necessary and sufficient; 3) The associated control is acting on an open subset of the set $\{U : P_β(U) = \sqrt{U f(U)}\}$, in particular it is uniformly integrable, and it depends smoothly on $(β,f)$ on a dense open set; 4)The effort function $E(β,f)$ is only $C^1$ w.r.t. $β$ and Lipschitz w.r.t. $f$ in the $C^2$-topology, and is asymptocally linear for $β\to \infty$; 5)$β\mapsto E(β,f)$ is in general neither convex nor subadditive.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了入侵物种控制模型中最优行波的结构及最小控制努力函数的正则性。
AI.translated_summary: 我们对Bressan、Chiri和Salehi在[Math. Models Methods Appl. Sci., 2022]中提出的入侵物种控制模型的最优行波U(t,x)=U(x-βt)进行了详细分析。入侵物种的相对密度U∈[0,1]满足以下带正控制的反应-扩散方程：U_t = U_{xx} + f(U) - α̃(t,x)U，其中U∈[0,1]，α̃≥0。控制α̃(t,x)表示在(t,x)处被移除的种群比例：维持以规定速度β传播的行波入侵前沿所需的最小控制努力E(β,f)定义为使PDE存在行波解U(x-βt)的α̃的最小L¹范数。为了研究大尺度动力学(t,x)↦(εt,εx)，行波的结构以及E的凸性和正则性性质起着关键作用。本文的主要结果如下：1）在相平面(U, P=U_x)中，存在唯一的最优轮廓P_β(U)使努力最小化；2）它满足显式的一阶条件，这些条件既是必要的也是充分的；3）相关控制作用于集合{U : P_β(U) = √(Uf(U))}的一个开子集上，特别地它是均匀可积的，并且在稠密开集上光滑依赖于(β,f)；4）努力函数E(β,f)关于β仅为C¹的，关于f在C²拓扑下是Lipschitz的，且当β→∞时渐近线性；5）β↦E(β,f)一般既不是凸的也不是次可加的。

AI.motivation: 理解行波结构和最小控制努力函数E(β,f)的凸性与正则性对于研究大尺度动力学行为至关重要，是分析入侵物种控制策略的基础。

AI.experiments: 本文为理论分析，无数值实验。
AI.result: 证明了唯一最优轮廓P_β(U)的存在性及显式一阶条件；控制作用于{U: P_β(U)=√(Uf(U))}的开子集上，均匀可积且光滑依赖(β,f)；E(β,f)关于β为C¹，关于f在C²拓扑下Lipschitz，β→∞时渐近线性，但一般非凸非次可加。

title: Non-volatile chirality switching by all-optical magnetization reversal in ferromagnetic Weyl semimetal Co3Sn2S2
summary: Weyl semimetals exhibit a unique feature known as Weyl nodes, which give rise to non-trivial topological features such as an anomalous Hall effect, and there are many efforts to try and control such properties. Here, the authors report light-induced chirality switching in a ferromagnetic Weyl semimetal Co3Sn2S2 using circularly polarized mid-infrared light pulse excitation.

title: Quantum Control Design by Lyapunov Trajectory Tracking and Optimal Control
summary: In this paper, we investigate a Lyapunov trajectory tracking design method that incorporates a Schrödinger equation with a dipole subterm and polarizability. Our findings suggest that the proposed control law can overcome the limitations of certain existing control laws that do not converge. By integrating a quadratic performance index, we introduce an optimal control law, which we subsequently analyze for stability and optimality. We also simulate the spin-1/2 particle system to illustrate our results. These findings are further validated through numerical illustrations involving a 3D, 5D system, and a spin-1/2 particle system.

title: Task Graph Generation for Heterogeneous UAV Swarms in Partially Observable Adversarial Environments
summary: In partially observable adversarial environments, heterogeneous unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) swarms must generate tasks online from noisy observations while respecting platform capabilities, consumable resources, and structural dependencies among tasks. This paper proposes a task graph generation method that converts local observations, target beliefs, and UAV resource states into executable task graphs with explicit resource semantics and inter-task relations. The method first constructs a sufficiently expressive candidate task graph in the belief and resource spaces. An offline search teacher then evaluates future trajectory particles, resource feasibility, and structural interaction values to produce supervision for node selection, marginal task value, and relation prediction. A relation-biased graph attention network learns to generate task graphs online, and a task manager further performs task filtering, dependency repair, conflict completion, and resource checking. Simulation results under complex observation pressure and unseen adversarial strategies show that the proposed method consistently improves structural generation quality and execution feasibility. Compared with Graphormer, it improves the task-graph utility, task-edge F1-score, and executable-graph ratio by 5.83%, 5.41%, and 2.68%, respectively, while reducing the infeasible-task ratio by 35.14%. These results indicate that combining an offline search teacher with resource-constrained graph modeling provides an effective front-end task organization mechanism for heterogeneous UAV swarm planning.

AI.tldr: 提出离线搜索教师驱动的图生成方法，提升异构无人机集群任务图质量与可执行性。

title: Conditioning of incoherent sub-dictionaries sampled from a coherent dictionary
summary: Motivated by the desire to find a realistic and stable random model for $d$-dimensional signals, that are sparse in a transform-based and thus often coherent frame, such as a wavelet or a Gabor frame, we study the conditioning of incoherent sub-dictionaries sampled from a coherent dictionary, such as a unit norm frame. In particular, we show that if the sub-dictionary is selected via a coherence rejective Poisson sampling model, it is well-conditioned with high probability, as long as its expected size scales as $d/\log (K)$, where $K$ is the number of dictionary elements. The result is proved for the more general case of sampling quadratic sub-matrices from a real but not necessarily symmetric $K\times K$ matrix with zero diagonal, where coherence rejective sampling is defined via a symmetric mask, that acts as coherence substitute.

title: Bialgebraic geometry of Böttcher coordinates
summary:
Becker and Bergweiler showed that if $f$ is a non-exceptional polynomial, then the Böttcher coordinate $Ψ_f \colon \mathbb D_R \to B_\infty(f)$ associated to $f$ is a transcendental function. In this paper, we study $f$-bialgebraic sets: algebraic subsets of $\mathbb D_R^n$ whose image under the coordinate-wise action of $Ψ_f$ is contained in an algebraic set of the same dimension.
  We give a complete dynamical classification of bialgebraic sets under the additional assumption that the Julia set of $f$ is either disconnected, or connected and admits a nondegenerate locally connected model. Inspired by the Ax--Lindemann--Weierstrass theorem and the Ax--Schanuel conjecture, we formulate analogs with $Ψ_f$ in place of the exponential function and prove them in the case where the Julia set $J_f$ is disconnected.

AI.tldr: 对多项式Böttcher坐标的双代数集给出完整动力学分类，并在Julia集不连通时证明Ax-Lindemann-W...
AI.translated_summary: Becker和Bergweiler证明了，若f是非例外多项式，则与f关联的Böttcher坐标Ψ_f: D_R → B_∞(f)是超越函数。本文研究f-双代数集：即D_R^n的代数子集，其在Ψ_f的逐坐标作用下的像包含在相同维数的代数集中。我们在Julia集不连通或连通且容许非退化局部连通模型的附加假设下，给出了双代数集的完整动力学分类。受Ax-Lindemann-Weierstrass定理和Ax-Schanuel猜想的启发，我们以Ψ_f代替指数函数提出了相应的类比，并在Julia集J_f不连通的情况下证明了这些类比。

AI.key_innovation: 引入f-双代数集概念并在特定Julia集条件下给出完整动力学分类；以Böttcher坐标替代指数函数建立Ax-Lindemann-Weierstrass和Ax-Schanuel的动力学类比并予以证明。
AI.motivation: Becker和Bergweiler已证明Böttcher坐标的超越性，自然需要研究其双代数结构，并探索经典超越性定理在多项式动力学中的类比。
AI.method: 定义f-双代数集，利用Julia集的拓扑与动力学结构，结合代数几何方法进行分类，并借鉴Ax-Lindemann-Weierstrass定理的证明策略建立动力学类比。
AI.experiments: 本文为理论数学研究，无实验部分。
AI.result: 在Julia集不连通或连通且容许非退化局部连通模型的条件下，完成了双代数集的完整动力学分类；在Julia集不连通时证明了Ax-Lindemann-Weierstrass和Ax-Schanuel类比定理。
AI.conclusion: Böttcher坐标下的双代数集在较一般的Julia集条件下可被完整分类，经典超越性定理的动力学类比在Julia集不连通时成立。
AI.limitations: Ax-Lindemann-Weierstrass和Ax-Schanuel类比的证明仅限于Julia集不连通的情形，连通情形尚待解决。

title: Asymptotics of Soliton Gas for the Derivative Nonlinear Schrodinger Equation
summary: There are three types of derivative nonlinear Schrodinger (DNLS) equations, which are gauge equivalent to each other. Starting from a reflectionless potential of the DNLS equation, we formulate a pure \(N\)-soliton solution via a meromorphic Riemann-Hilbert problem and study its continuum limit as \(N\to\infty\). Under a suitable scaling of the normalizing constant, this limit yields a \(\bar\partial\)-problem that provides a continuous spectral description of the DNLS soliton gas. For admissible domains, e.g., ellipses with Schwarz-function boundaries, the \(\bar\partial\)-problem reduces to a contour Riemann-Hilbert problem, enabling derivation of the large-\(x\) and long-time asymptotics of the soliton gas. In the large-\(x\) regime, the soliton gas decays exponentially as \(x\to+\infty\) while approaches a periodic elliptic background as \(x\to-\infty\). For long-time asymptotics, the self-similar variable \(ξ=x/t\) leads to two distinct scenarios, producing stratified asymptotic regions described by one-phase, two-phase, or three-phase Riemann theta functions. A key structural feature is the symmetry-induced genus reduction: the Abelian geometry associated with an apparent \((2N+1)\)-genus Riemann surface degenerates to that of an effective \(N\)-genus surface. We also derive a kinetic equation for the effective group velocity of a test soliton moving through the soliton gas. Finally, it is shown that the continuum-limit solution admits a Fredholm determinant representation, yielding the associated \(τ\)-function and thereby providing an operator-theoretic characterization of the DNLS soliton gas.

AI.tldr: 通过∂̄-问题研究DNLS孤子气体的连续极限与渐近行为，并给出Fredholm行列式表示。
AI.translated_summary: 导数非线性薛定谔(DNLS)方程有三种类型，彼此规范等价。从DNLS方程的无反射势出发，我们通过亚纯黎曼-希尔伯特问题构造纯N-孤子解，并研究N→∞时的连续极限。在归一化常数的适当标度下，该极限产生一个∂̄-问题，为DNLS孤子气体提供连续谱描述。对于容许域（例如具有Schwarz函数边界的椭圆），∂̄-问题退化为等高线黎曼-希尔伯特问题，从而可以推导孤子气体的大x和长时间渐近行为。在大x区域，孤子气体在x→+∞时指数衰减，而在x→-∞时趋于周期椭圆背景。对于长时间渐近，自相似变量ξ=x/t导致两种不同情形，产生由单相、双相或三相黎曼θ函数描述的分层渐近区域。一个关键结构特征是对称诱导的亏格约化：与表观(2N+1)亏格黎曼曲面相关的阿贝尔几何退化为有效N亏格曲面的几何。我们还推导了测试孤子在孤子气体中运动的有效群速度的动力学方程。最后，证明了连续极限解允许Fredholm行列式表示，由此得到相应的τ函数，从而提供了DNLS孤子气体的算子理论刻画。

title: E Scheme and Flux-Limiter Scheme, Revisited
summary: This paper revisits the {\em E scheme} of Osher \cite{Osher-SINUM1984} and the {\em flux-limiter scheme} of Sweby for quasi-linear hyperbolic conservation laws \cite{Sweby-SINUM1984}. Part of existing results will be re-understood and some new results will be presented. For a scalar conservation law, except for the conservative monotone schemes, the E scheme is a type of numerical methods that satisfy the discrete entropy condition for any convex entropy, but numerical entropy flux is not unique. Two-point E flux is monotone flux, but multi-point (three or more points) E flux may not necessarily be monotone flux, and multi-point monotone flux may not necessarily be E flux. Sweby's flux-limiter scheme for the quasi-linear conservation laws was built on the E flux-based splitting $f_{j+1}-f_j=f_{j+1} { -\hat{f}^{\text{\tiny E}}_{j+\frac12}+\hat{f}^{\text{\tiny E}}_{j+\frac12}}-f_j$ and the LW scheme. It may not be second-order accurate in both space and time.

AI.tldr: 重新审视E格式与通量限制器格式的理论性质，揭示多点E通量与单调通量的非等价性及精度局限。

title: Multiplexed quantum repeaters based on single-photon interference with mild stabilization
summary: Abstract Quantum repeaters are pivotal in the physical layer of the quantum internet, and quantum repeaters capable of efficient entanglement distribution are necessary for its development. Quantum repeater schemes based on single-photon interference are promising because of their potential efficiency. However, schemes involving first-order interference with photon sources at distant nodes require stringent phase stability of the components, which pose challenges for long-distance implementation. In this paper, we present a quantum repeater scheme that leverages single-photon interference and reduces the difficulty of achieving phase stabilization. Additionally, under specific conditions, our scheme achieves a higher entanglement distribution rate between end nodes compared with the existing schemes. Thus, the proposed approach could lead to improved rates with technologies that are currently unavailable but possible in the future and will ultimately facilitate the development of multimode quantum repeaters.

title: Discrimination of Non-Local Correlations
summary: In view of the importance of quantum non-locality in cryptography, quantum computation, and communication complexity, it is crucial to decide whether a given correlation exhibits non-locality or not. As proved by Pitowski, this problem is NP-complete, and is thus computationally intractable unless NP is equal to P. In this paper, we first prove that the Euclidean distance of given correlations from the local polytope can be computed in polynomial time with arbitrary fixed error, granted the access to a certain oracle; namely, given a fixed error, we derive two upper bounds on the running time. The first bound is linear in the number of measurements. The second bound scales with the number of measurements to the sixth power. The former holds only for a very high number of measurements, and is never observed in the performed numerical tests. We, then, introduce a simple algorithm for simulating the oracle. In all of the considered numerical tests, the simulation of the oracle contributes with a multiplicative factor to the overall running time and, thus, does not affect the sixth-power law of the oracle-assisted algorithm.

AI.tldr: 提出预言机辅助算法，可在多项式时间内以固定误差计算关联与局部多面体的欧几里得距离，运行时间呈六次方标度。
AI.translated_summary: 鉴于量子非定域性在密码学、量子计算和通信复杂性中的重要性，判定给定关联是否表现出非定域性至关重要。正如Pitowski所证明的，该问题是NP完全的，因此除非NP等于P，否则在计算上是不可处理的。在本文中，我们首先证明，在可以访问某个预言机的前提下，给定关联与局部多面体的欧几里得距离可以在多项式时间内以任意固定误差计算；即，给定固定误差，我们推导出运行时间的两个上界。第一个界与测量数量呈线性关系。第二个界与测量数量的六次方成正比。前者仅在测量数量非常大时成立，且在所进行的数值测试中从未被观察到。然后，我们引入一个简单的算法来模拟该预言机。在所有考虑的数值测试中，预言机的模拟对总运行时间贡献了一个乘法因子，因此不影响预言机辅助算法的六次方规律。

AI.key_innovation: 证明在预言机辅助下，关联与局部多面体的欧几里得距离可在多项式时间内以任意固定误差计算，并推导出两个运行时间上界；同时提出预言机模拟算法。

AI.experiments: 进行了多项数值测试，验证两个运行时间上界及预言机模拟算法的实际表现。

title: Dual-Channel Voice Communication System Based on One-Way Quantum Secure Direct Communication—Classical Optical Communication Hybrid Mode
summary: Quantum secure direct communication, as an important branch of quantum communication, possesses strict information-theoretic security and can achieve secure communication in channel environments with noise interference and eavesdropping threats. As voice communication is the most fundamental and widespread communication method in daily life, guaranteeing its security and efficiency has become an important research topic in current communication technology. One-way quantum secure direct communication technology can build an efficient and reliable security barrier for voice communication services, effectively preventing the leakage of private information in voice communication. This paper proposes a duplex voice communication scheme based on one-way quantum secure direct communication. By adopting a method combining multi-task parallel processing and stream processing, the communication rate and transmission delay performance of the system are significantly improved. Relying on quantum secure direct communication technology and the one-time-key encryption channel within the system, duplex voice communication is achieved securely. The real-time temperature drift compensation algorithm is introduced to ensure the long-term stable operation of the system. At the same time, through the real-time temperature drift prediction mechanism, the strategy selection during the call process is optimized to ensure the quality of the voice communication. To verify the feasibility and performance of this scheme, a one-way quantum secure direct communication duplex voice communication system was built in the laboratory environment, and comprehensive performance indicator tests were conducted. The test results show that the constructed one-way quantum secure direct communication system can fully meet the performance requirements of duplex voice communication. The realization of this system successfully achieves the goal of secure and efficient quantum voice communication, laying an important technical foundation for further expanding the practical application scenarios of quantum communication technology and promoting the industrialization development of quantum communication.

AI.tldr: 提出基于单向量子安全直接通信的双工语音通信方案，实现安全高效的量子语音通信。
AI.translated_summary: 量子安全直接通信作为量子通信的重要分支，具有严格的信息论安全性，能够在存在噪声干扰和窃听威胁的信道环境中实现安全通信。由于语音通信是日常生活中最基本、最广泛的通信方式，保障其安全性和效率已成为当前通信技术的重要研究课题。单向量子安全直接通信技术能够为语音通信业务构建高效可靠的安全屏障，有效防止语音通信中私人信息的泄露。本文提出了一种基于单向量子安全直接通信的双工语音通信方案。通过采用多任务并行处理与流处理相结合的方法，显著提升了系统的通信速率和传输延迟性能。依托量子安全直接通信技术和系统内部的一次性密钥加密信道，安全地实现了双工语音通信。引入实时温度漂移补偿算法以确保系统的长期稳定运行。同时，通过实时温度漂移预测机制，优化通话过程中的策略选择，确保语音通信质量。为验证该方案的可行性和性能，在实验室环境中搭建了单向量子安全直接通信双工语音通信系统，并进行了全面的性能指标测试。测试结果表明，所构建的单向量子安全直接通信系统能够完全满足双工语音通信的性能要求。该系统的实现成功达成了安全高效的量子语音通信目标，为进一步拓展量子通信技术的实际应用场景和推动量子通信产业化发展奠定了重要的技术基础。

title: Gradient Mean-Field Dynamics with Measure-Valued States: Well-Posedness, Chaos, and Long-Time Stability
summary: We study a stochastic mean-field interacting particle system whose state space is $\Y = \Tt^d \times \cP(U)$, where the first component represents a spatial variable and the second one is a probability measure over a compact metric space $U$. The dynamics are driven by locally Lipschitz drift operators: the spatial component evolves according to a Brownian diffusion, while the measure-valued component is perturbed by a projected cylindrical noise acting in the Arens--Eells space. We first establish existence and uniqueness of strong solutions for both the $N$-particle system and the associated nonlinear McKean--Vlasov equation under locally Lipschitz and linear growth assumptions on the drift coefficients. We then prove propagation of chaos: as $N\to\infty$, the empirical measure converges in expectation in Wasserstein--1 distance towards the unique McKean--Vlasov solution. Further, we investigate exponential convergence of the nonlinear McKean--Vlasov dynamics towards a unique invariant measure.

AI.tldr: 研究了空间-测度耦合的平均场粒子系统，证明了强解存在唯一性、混沌传播及指数收敛性。
AI.translated_summary: 我们研究一个随机平均场相互作用粒子系统，其状态空间为 $Y = \mathbb{T}^d \times \mathcal{P}(U)$，其中第一个分量表示空间变量，第二个分量是紧度量空间 $U$ 上的概率测度。动力学由局部 Lipschitz 漂移算子驱动：空间分量按布朗扩散演化，而测度值分量则由在 Arens–Eells 空间中作用的投影柱噪声扰动。我们首先在漂移系数满足局部 Lipschitz 和线性增长假设下，建立了 $N$ 粒子系统及相关非线性 McKean–Vlasov 方程强解的存在性与唯一性。然后我们证明了混沌传播：当 $N \to \infty$ 时，经验测度在 Wasserstein-1 距离下依期望收敛到唯一的 McKean–Vlasov 解。进一步，我们研究了非线性 McKean–Vlasov 动力学向唯一不变测度的指数收敛性。
AI.research_problem: 在状态空间同时包含空间变量和测度值分量的情形下，如何在局部 Lipschitz（而非全局 Lipschitz）条件下建立平均场粒子系统的适定性、混沌传播及长期收敛性。
AI.key_innovation: 处理了空间分量与测度值分量耦合的混合状态空间系统，在局部 Lipschitz 和线性增长条件下利用 Arens–Eells 空间中的投影柱噪声建立强解理论，并证明混沌传播与指数收敛。
AI.motivation: 平均场粒子系统中同时包含空间动力学与测度演化的混合模型缺乏在较弱漂移条件下的系统性理论分析，需要填补这一空白。
AI.method: 在局部 Lipschitz 和线性增长假设下，利用无穷维随机分析工具（Arens–Eells 空间、投影柱噪声）建立 $N$ 粒子系统和 McKean–Vlasov 方程的强解理论，并通过 Wasserstein-1 距离分析混沌传播与不变测度的指数收敛。
AI.experiments: 本文为理论研究，无数值实验。
AI.result: 在局部 Lipschitz 和线性增长条件下证明了 $N$ 粒子系统和非线性 McKean–Vlasov 方程强解的存在唯一性；证明了混沌传播（经验测度在 $W_1$ 距离下依期望收敛）；研究了非线性动力学向唯一不变测度的指数收敛性。
AI.conclusion: 该混合状态空间的平均场粒子系统在局部 Lipschitz 条件下具有完整的适定性理论，混沌传播成立，且非线性动力学具有指数收敛到不变测度的性质。
